name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: We beat Big Pharma...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
But they're preparing to fight back.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56529677/385292589/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221228EOY_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODk2ZGNjMC0wYjg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kBOSOsUKXnCgwuAVOQRHg_myneqfLGAvxlhgQj3pwA0=)
---
I voted earlier this year to pass the Inflation Reduction Act, which contained critical provisions to lower the cost of prescription drugs. Because of this landmark legislation, the price of insulin will be capped at just $35 per month, and the government will be able to negotiate for lower prices on other drugs and crack down on drug companies that have price-gouged Americans for far too long.

**We successfully took on Big Pharma and delivered real change.** So it shouldn't come as any surprise that special interests are now gearing up to undo this progress.

_Politico_ recently reported that Big Pharma has hired one of the top lobbying firms in the country to "examine the organization’s failure to stop Democrats’ drug-pricing measures." And we all know that after the autopsy report, millions will be spent to attack the members of Congress who had the courage to support these measures.

As a Democrat representing a swing district, I'm likely to be a major target of Big Pharma in 2024, and I'm taking nothing for granted. That's why I've been reaching out to supporters for the first time since the November election and asking for their help to meet my end-of-year fundraising goal.

[**Right now, we're still $11,200 away from where we need to be. So if you chip in right now, it would go a long way toward closing the gap.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56529678/385292617/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221228EOY_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODk2ZGNjMC0wYjg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kBOSOsUKXnCgwuAVOQRHg_myneqfLGAvxlhgQj3pwA0=) [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56529679/385292618/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221228EOY_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODk2ZGNjMC0wYjg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kBOSOsUKXnCgwuAVOQRHg_myneqfLGAvxlhgQj3pwA0=) I'll proudly run on the transformational legislation I've supported, no matter which special interest groups it angers.

Our grassroots campaign needs to be ready to withstand well-funded attacks once again. If we hold VA-10 in 2024, Democrats will have a real chance to take back the House — and build upon legislation such as the Inflation Reduction Act.

**Please stand with me and make a donation of $10 before the year ends:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw_em**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56529680/385292619/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221228EOY_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODk2ZGNjMC0wYjg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kBOSOsUKXnCgwuAVOQRHg_myneqfLGAvxlhgQj3pwA0=)

Thanks so much,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56529681/385292620/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221228EOY_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODk2ZGNjMC0wYjg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kBOSOsUKXnCgwuAVOQRHg_myneqfLGAvxlhgQj3pwA0=)****

name: Adam Schiff
subject: 2024 starts now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Make no mistake, Kevin McCarthy will begin his efforts to sabotage the Biden administration as soon as next week, and he is willing to make me political collateral to appease the MAGA base — whose support he is relying on to secure the Speaker’s gavel.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1517%2E5257348%2E4Zf1RH)
Derek, we have about 72 hours until we reach the final FEC fundraising deadline of the entire year. This is the first deadline of the 2024 campaign, and continuing our momentum after our historic midterm defense is crucial if we’re going to hold the White House and retake the House majority.
Make no mistake, Kevin McCarthy will begin his efforts to sabotage the Biden administration as soon as next week, and he is willing to make me political collateral to appease the MAGA base — whose support he is relying on to secure the Speaker’s gavel.
**[So I am humbly asking, can I count on your support so we are ready to respond? $10, $25, whatever you can chip in to help kickstart the fight for Democrats to win in 2024 makes a big difference.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221228_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1517%2E5257348%2E4Zf1RH)**

name: Kari Lake
subject: I wanted to be first to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
|

---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point — that’s just not an option.**

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona’s November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I’m not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you — I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know — do I have your support?**

clean_body: Really | | | | | | | Untitled Document Friend, Did you see my previous email? I am personally offering you an 1100%-IMPACT for TODAY ONLY. Thank you, Donald J. Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: December 28, 2022 To: < > Friend, I need you right now. Joe Biden and the Radical Left are working overtime to try to UNDO everything we accomplished together on behalf of the American People. Two years ago, the United States stood ready for its Golden Age. Our Nation was at a pinnacle of power, prosperity, and prestige—towering above all rivals, vanquishing all enemies, and striding into the future confident and strong. We have a MAJOR END-OF-YEAR FUNDRAISING DEADLINE coming up, and I really need aTop Patriot like YOU to step up. This is our FIRST REPORTING DEADLINE since I announced I am running for President, and I want to ensure we finish this year STRONG as we ramp up our efforts for our 2024 CAMPAIGN. Friend, we have a HUGE goal to crush before the year is over, but I can’t do it without you. Your support is so vital to our success that I’ve activated an 1100%-IMPACT just for YOU. Our FINAL End-of-Year fundraising goal is PARAMOUNT! Our 2022 fundraising total will be made PUBLIC for the entire world to see. I’m reviewing the next donor listTONIGHT , and I expect your name to be on there. Thank you, Donald J. Derek -- I don’t want to keep you from any holiday celebrations by listing _all_ the things we’ve accomplished this year, so I’ll just share a few ahead of Saturday’s fundraising deadline. **[If you can, chip in $7 to help keep it up, and then read on to refresh yourself on some of what our party has achieved this year.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ3oDEPNIBpOo7uCgwnD2SG7oQTsrfBePTpoPiouTmSq8qz2c4FSSE6xlhuCJOCwyJzazmYXQd_hn1uE9X-jEgkmvBmB9z9VnceyCpSlEOxoYUL9jEvGjm-z7fzPk505udtlRGYK6Yp3QLlVMXs-bVf67vQpVvFCu55HVQibnJIC-Pj0-edaj3BqAkVlUQ7soqdZEyMwpzeScyLmWGom6bEZfE3kpWbQVBdAi9FcIZUgmRhTUsLam5ciD3b8GYLw9-2_nqAHHueRD-_N_BSJPKObxYy9LtBRt0WUqCYX0XLjdT5c0Xb0HZ4zRwz6QbV_8wpohgr1RfeO_yvgX_4wMT0NMOCJ-AmU-hgdRI9pMASMhvRx1ORE2WXBKsASFGKXE7aev19-zJ_9-yrRWZpPKZwhbKxHSox-eGDmVdmqzPmo6kXaVXn_hBNsfkXIrVHr1hif4kUyAiq9vsR3KYp1xMmcqvBQ1EgvQDmDijPCVdrervYttU6XOsWw7jEKXSrucT-ekYPyUpVxidPikp5ULTZ-N11LnsHXu1Pc0RPgQ6wJp_bhOFpIWABis-hGFFe5hEvsNI52mgAOIngrVqqfw9f5KcZWjf8GnJnZa8HIKFF0nBwx38UpDW0ZQfPbmgA1eA1T6f53apyG5Gq75wG4L1Jw/3se/AI0Y6dyQRoGhPVXmonUFkA/h0/zEkwE0FLDlFZO1vMrPVPL1NrOiIh6RulyXS0NK3dh6o)** Working together, Democrats:
* Took on special interests by passing the most significant gun safety legislation in three decades;
* Beat Big Pharma and capped prescription drug costs for seniors;
* Confirmed 97 Article III judges, including Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson;
* Passed the CHIPS and Science Act, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, the PACT Act, and the _Respect for Marriage Act_ ;
* And so much more.

And if that wasn’t enough, every single Democratic senator that was up for reelection won -- _and we even flipped Pennsylvania’s Senate seat._ This was a history-making election and a monumental year for Democrats. I’m reminding you of our many accomplishments this year because you directly support that work, Derek. **[Whether it was volunteering, donating, or spreading the word to families and friends, you played a major role in the success of Democrats this year. clean_body: Every single Democratic senator that was up for reelection won -- and we even flipped Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. This was a history-making election and a monumental year for Democrats. | | Derek -- I don’t want to keep you from any holiday celebrations by listing all the things we’ve accomplished this year, so I’ll just share a few ahead of Saturday’s fundraising deadline. Working together, Democrats: Took on special interests by passing the most significant gun safety legislation in three decades; Beat Big Pharma and capped prescription drug costs for seniors; Confirmed 97 Article III judges, including Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson; Passed the CHIPS and Science Act, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, the PACT Act, and the Respect for Marriage Act ; And so much more. And if that wasn’t enough, every single Democratic senator that was up for reelection won -- and we even flipped Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. This was a history-making election and a monumental year for Democrats. I’m reminding you of our many accomplishments this year because you directly support that work, Derek. I cannot thank you enough for your support throughout this year. It was hard work but we got it done. And we’ll do the same in 2023. Thank you and Happy New Year, Chuck Chuck Schumer Senate Majority Leader U.S. Senator, New York Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . Friend,
Over the past two years, Joe Biden has invited millions of illegal aliens to infiltrate our Country in a gigantic unlawful invasion. _Now, after announcing on April 1, 2022, that he would end my Title 42 protections at the border and declining to appeal numerous court rulings_ , **Biden is getting what he always wanted: the termination of the most effective border security policy in modern history.**

Biden is willfully and deliberately triggering a cataclysm of illegal immigration like the world has never seen before.

Make no mistake, the border nightmare is happening for a single reason: because illegal aliens know that if they break into our Country unlawfully, Joe Biden will do everything possible to ensure that they are not removed and are allowed to stay here indefinitely. They may take your jobs and try to vote in OUR elections and Joe Biden doesn’t care.

Any form of amnesty now would be a historic disaster. **It would reward Joe Biden’s lawlessness** ,_it would reward the criminal cartels_ , it would reward child traffickers, and it would reward everyone who has broken the laws of our Nation.

**Every Republican must understand that any so-called “immigration reform” that gives Biden more resources will simply translate to even more releases.** _Biden inherited a flawless border policy and turned it into a mass-release machine._ The border can ONLY be secured by confronting Biden’s lawless and criminal misconduct—and stopping his illicit crusade to set loose millions of illegal aliens into the interior.

So, I am calling on Congress to take three crucial actions.

_**FIRST,**_ Congress must pass a TOTAL and PERMANENT BAN on Joe Biden or any other president using taxpayer dollars to release illegal aliens into our Country.

_**SECOND,**_ Congress needs to make permanent ALL of my administration’s groundbreaking border security reforms that allowed us to achieve the most secure border in history and to rapidly deport anyone who trespassed across our border.

_**THIRD,**_ Congress must establish _CRIMINAL PENALTIES_ for any senior official or political appointee who orders, aids, or abets the mass release of illegal aliens into the United States.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Untitled Document SUPPORTER: DEADLINE: IMMEDIATELY Friend, Over the past two years, Joe Biden has invited millions of illegal aliens to infiltrate our Country in a gigantic unlawful invasion. Now, after announcing on April 1, 2022, that he would end my Title 42 protections at the border and declining to appeal numerous court rulings , Biden is getting what he always wanted: the termination of the most effective border security policy in modern history. Biden is willfully and deliberately triggering a cataclysm of illegal immigration like the world has never seen before. Make no mistake, the border nightmare is happening for a single reason: because illegal aliens know that if they break into our Country unlawfully, Joe Biden will do everything possible to ensure that they are not removed and are allowed to stay here indefinitely. They may take your jobs and try to vote in OUR elections and Joe Biden doesn’t care. Any form of amnesty now would be a historic disaster. It would reward Joe Biden’s lawlessness ,it would reward the criminal cartels , it would reward child traffickers, and it would reward everyone who has broken the laws of our Nation. Every Republican must understand that any so-called “immigration reform” that gives Biden more resources will simply translate to even more releases. Biden inherited a flawless border policy and turned it into a mass-release machine. The border can ONLY be secured by confronting Biden’s lawless and criminal misconduct—and stopping his illicit crusade to set loose millions of illegal aliens into the interior. So, I am calling on Congress to take three crucial actions. FIRST, Congress must pass a TOTAL and PERMANENT BAN on Joe Biden or any other president using taxpayer dollars to release illegal aliens into our Country. SECOND, Congress needs to make permanent ALL of my administration’s groundbreaking border security reforms that allowed us to achieve the most secure border in history and to rapidly deport anyone who trespassed across our border. THIRD, Congress must establish CRIMINAL PENALTIES for any senior official or political appointee who orders, aids, or abets the mass release of illegal aliens into the United States. I know this is a lot of information, Friend, but I really need you to understand how critical this is. I need YOU to stop what you’re doing and sign my petition to DEMAND Joe Biden secure the Southern Border. SUPPORTER: DEADLINE: IMMEDIATELY Thank you, Donald J. name: American Update
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0366%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=wYvrIsCWXKa3VWDODEu%2faA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44930%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fDMDwWD67CXMYT0gwRJy%2fA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44930%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fDMDwWD67CXMYT0gwRJy%2fA&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. name: GOP Presidential
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
Have you heard of COP26? Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shor
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbntddg07mdfirsc0v60321abvn2flbfmi3aoc5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi68or6c1h2bs) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmgsl90ej91idktqa5o4u5ocn80bpb6jccr1o028_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi68or6c1h2bs) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo3kq4fecnimccm64f2jpmf5ngs7kk637j64fkgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi68or6c1h2bs) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ will play out – and what it means for your money.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhm9o738tn9smncmul8i5uefv7rr3ekrkrtjv7lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi68or6c1h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh71kcf1iojgpcbjfpcnvrhic51686l1jdpva5v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi68or2cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zejfniacv877ncib9c90c3unt91lkk87l4umfog8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi68or2cth2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z25pc8ncoh73s9riqk1hs0aqfgeps85odfuunn38_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi68or2cth2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zneuuh9k545hco7969vis4q1d67depir7gsio3c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi68or2cth2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcl84tiqqj43osffk1cd2knj3sn906nopc6l87a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi68or2cth2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdqmp5l4l35u8jge597di2eopo78irv0k2at3o9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi68or6c3h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. body:

Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty -- the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99894%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3nOifNQg7Zx6dK5NZEsJ6A&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
This is troubling. Have you heard of COP26?
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr8sphrljvpb1srkh12hjl5eomtohae1hm40gi4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi64pb6cth2bs) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z29it897mogf96a9nai1lu3t2nucuq0l6cnb001g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi64pb6cth2bs) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z07a0e8kkbbmcjqapibdins10kr0kbu3csor5f20_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi64pb6cth2bs) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ will play out – and what it means for your money.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4bndsbjmgprj2q3t41ogg6t4gfbfb9rlmv6s6og_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi64pb6cth2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---

body:

Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoit9c6vaa1mivlcip8dfuu31g8i0af3tdn6krko_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi6eo32c3h2bs)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk.
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjqsr9lshos8b3di470u2fk347o5oo5g90ioar58_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi6eo32c9h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z83lsv3tgt7omotl24se6kls2djc67u5jb5caldo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi6eo32c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5ml097a2m9nmpauo975i4qb2gbp65lr2ekms89o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi6eo32c9h2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling, Friend
body:
I just read one of the best things of 2022 – The Washington Post, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcomi
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdrnoorgpc9shts98m3peab9q4ai09em9g9709r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi6eo32c3h2bs)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We 're winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's belief in that trust-- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That's why I've set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1g67tvv3dr2g196v3eurqpu82uu97giokba84c8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi6eo32c3h2bs)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They've used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don 't stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu9tekda6upjkepdkg1vnvi0hhb59d07gsgqfvfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi6eo32c3h2bs)

Here's how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7e7cv322ekljt17tv7m4ua1rkinej43kqm9fk0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi6eo32cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbaj3m2f7ttcgmla28q04m50mfm19f3mb0pjifh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi6eo32cjh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpb0gab32q7h800uptaimk2kkme85p9gtd9sdido_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi6eo32cjh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Great America Update
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7525%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=x9Nzwj89gkGHqiWw41acaw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78559%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KXjCnsoenQIUYxKQk2Cisw&sysid=1) Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78559%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KXjCnsoenQIUYxKQk2Cisw&sysid=1) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78550%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M9wrKbi3ZcSXc%2bjpFPvO%2fg&sysid=1) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78550%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M9wrKbi3ZcSXc%2bjpFPvO%2fg&sysid=1) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78551%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m5ZccXeizwlU3msMJBX%2byQ&sysid=1) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk.
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbm8s6enut0su9nqaugpv2a2c4oginsid4vfd9u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi61o72cjh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcolma9esgtjii5bvfd73n9othsa8s42ffjgfg9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi61o72cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvm6jgtm4i3vvkkh8o60pjlgandv57ji9f084a58_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi61o72cjh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvqrschu12pardkdtsk2ia6tdoji3vs44ip4pmf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi61o72cjh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

---

| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next week.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zckp07a8iusk8l21hfgpte17v0490722g0ulp0i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi61o72clh2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z33b68alhpial71dvv3r863uhg2hlt7r26q3rcmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi61o72clh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdloim25pg5fb72qtcra0ckgimjpar57q09r08j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi61o72clh2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt183alqsp5rsmbjtoob6u7835h2b98o2urjhac0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpi61o72clh2bs)**

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

body:
| [ ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlp7in30uk9fqa6nhbuqn1gt45gafpan347tjpi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph60or6cph2bs)
---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrfn991rv2m1c8bdj54urss2bqjeue0udj8pp1bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph60or6cph2bs)

Best,

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2sbhek0lvn9tthhmta3cha3p9uj77t3oo068sao_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph60or2c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u2q7cplleko72t9gc3hmcdpm6sqm3d5hm2pn1clgelp60odme1ob6c74s8r7edtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sjicoo71cr0cup74phmc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
# **#1 Item to Hoard**
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3nhr2tslpueun9mdmhmb9csepui50p0gt6iepp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph60or2c3h2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.

Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that’s just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona’s November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I’m not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

name: Marco R.
subject: Have you given up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, I'm so sorry for reaching out like this. It's Marco, and I'm reaching out because I am about to fall short of my biggest deadline since the election. This would be DISASTROUS for our movement.
**_Our ENTIRE 2023 Budget is at stake.

The American Dream will grow even further out of reach.

And if I fall short, this beautiful country will be ONE STEP closer to socialism._**
If you don't care about the Senate or getting our country back on track, that's fine. But please don't complain when the Democrats take further control of your life because you refused to step up. **My entire 2023 budget is funded on donations,[so I'm humbly asking you ONE LAST TIME to donate whatever you can so I can reach my End of Year Goal.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62134515:6ecy8wGfN:m:1:3331421248:289D8D0A9AD2960FC111873A86F9E49E:r "so I’m humbly asking you ONE LAST TIME to donate whatever you can so I can reach my End of Year Goal.")**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62134515:6ecy8wGfN:m:1:3331421248:289D8D0A9AD2960FC111873A86F9E49E:r "DONATE
NOW >>")
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62134515:6ecy8wGfN:m:1:3331421248:289D8D0A9AD2960FC111873A86F9E49E:r "Marco Rubio: I need your help")
---
| | | [HELP MARCO HERE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62134515:6ecy8wGfN:m:1:3331421248:289D8D0A9AD2960FC111873A86F9E49E:r "HELP MARCO HERE >>")
---
Please don't look back and wish you did more to save our country.

Marco Rubio
---
| | |

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62134516:6ecy8wGfN:m:1:3331421248:289D8D0A9AD2960FC111873A86F9E49E:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/american-dream-footer/?recurring=true")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62134516:6ecy8wGfN:m:1:3331421248:289D8D0A9AD2960FC111873A86F9E49E:r "Join my fight
to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62134516:6ecy8wGfN:m:1:3331421248:289D8D0A9AD2960FC111873A86F9E49E:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62134517:6ecy8wGfN:m:1:3331421248:289D8D0A9AD2960FC111873A86F9E49E:r "Stop the Dems Footer")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62134517:6ecy8wGfN:m:1:3331421248:289D8D0A9AD2960FC111873A86F9E49E:r "If you’re
committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq352r00n7dq60pjogk2cdv5j4v0j99temcva19g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph64ob6c3h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z02l38mo6mti7q1ahonegq0fk7vuvluujs428hfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph64ob6c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpv1arufbtpohbr8svn8lhiqe5tui7koa359kmk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph64ob6c3h2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn3bgv23f775u948nfcmkjisg2crvklq4nutodog_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph64ob6c3h2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj7o27uc1gpjankv5bgoo299d346cno4e6kgrtoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph64ob6cph2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmacbapvdeatouvmlbvotos06f32antcgmepi5a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph64ob6cph2bs)

| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb5288p2vqrllr0eemb17d4pbt4hpl9g1a05e9p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cph64ob6cph2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you help me restore America’s guiding values?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I’m writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who [cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNjMtN2I4ZjEwYjdkMmNkNDkyOTliMGU0MmVhODg3MDI2NzgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFtZXJpY2FuY29ybmVyc3RvbmUub3JnL2N5ZS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jeWUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX1JBTk8xMjI5MjAyMiJ9/f2-km_rxdMlLYiov9PjPUw)

Have you ever stopped to think about how charitable giving is a brilliant reflection of freedom?

It’s a way for every American to use our hard-earned money to freely support the causes we care most about.

This is democracy in action: [because every dollar you give is a vote for the future you want to see.](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNjMtN2I4ZjEwYjdkMmNkNDkyOTliMGU0MmVhODg3MDI2NzgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFtZXJpY2FuY29ybmVyc3RvbmUub3JnL2N5ZS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jeWUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX1JBTk8xMjI5MjAyMiJ9/2RGxBipfLpyuSQonKRM07A)

And during this special season of giving, I'd like to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by [making a generous year-end gift of whatever your budget allows.](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNjMtN2I4ZjEwYjdkMmNkNDkyOTliMGU0MmVhODg3MDI2NzgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFtZXJpY2FuY29ybmVyc3RvbmUub3JnL2N5ZS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jeWUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX1JBTk8xMjI5MjAyMiJ9/drQk3JGfR2I0Dzmt9lr2xg)

Your investment will allow the American Cornerstone Institute to engage in independent research, grassroots outreach, and collaboration with conservative leaders to set forth a better path forward for our country, [safeguarding freedom for you and your family in 2023 and beyond.](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNjMtN2I4ZjEwYjdkMmNkNDkyOTliMGU0MmVhODg3MDI2NzgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFtZXJpY2FuY29ybmVyc3RvbmUub3JnL2N5ZS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jeWUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX1JBTk8xMjI5MjAyMiJ9/fLPhCV7u9Kr9KwX-YXxTxA)

Will you join me? If so, you can support these effort by clicking the link below:

**[**https://secure.americancornerstone.org/giving-season**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNjMtN2I4ZjEwYjdkMmNkNDkyOTliMGU0MmVhODg3MDI2NzgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFtZXJpY2FuY29ybmVyc3RvbmUub3JnL2N5ZS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jeWUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX1JBTk8xMjI5MjAyMiJ9/ReZcLgQyv9KcdXiAuKEnEg)**

Where the Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for limited government and self-determination.

America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Please help me do everything possible to make sure it stays that way.

Thank you for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. I know these are uncertain times. But no gift is too small. And every dollar you give today will have a long-term impact on restoring our nation's founding values. [**Click here to give whatever you can today »**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNjMtN2I4ZjEwYjdkMmNkNDkyOTliMGU0MmVhODg3MDI2NzgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFtZXJpY2FuY29ybmVyc3RvbmUub3JnL2N5ZS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jeWUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX1JBTk8xMjI5MjAyMiJ9/euOCimK7DU9w3sLWoT_mxw)
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7613%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=BCA93ufNuDCJOMSKoqhI3Q&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99803%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0M%2biqJrbEEGy85M35hOQCg&sysid=1)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99804%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Ky1dE23s02TbM%2fSm%2fBXiw&sysid=1)
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99815%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eqai3IjDZBDnllRy4EKDKw&sysid=1)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99816%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BYPr7716Wv9YZaEQZRYNLA&sysid=1) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress

I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along: From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews. In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently. And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus! | | | The Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31. To support the work God is doing through Pathway to Victory , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? subject: The Washington Post is falling, Friend
body:
I just read one of the best things of 2022 The Washington Post, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0363%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=k%2f%2bHapkBtBEf7HGIlSvoPQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We’re winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America’s belief in that trust -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That’s why I’ve set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44051%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=60vElLZhsvqIrF0uC6LiuA&sysid=1)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They’ve used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don’t stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44052%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Uto4ZTfbqQ6fEqXJwIwV%2fw&sysid=1)

Here’s how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC’s team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Martin Luther King Jr. Should've Been Quiet About Civil Rights...
body:
Separation of Church and State! This is the drum beat for the Leftists in America right now. Every day, I get bombarded on social media for having th
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9602.1.99e9a4610f5a6766c730a808461223dd)
---
**Separation of Church and State!** This is the drum beat for the Leftists in America right now.
Every day, I get bombarded on social media for having the audacity to engage in Civil affairs because I am the Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9603.1.125cf79459dbb185b116efca3870b2ae) in Tulsa, OK.
I am told that I cannot involve myself in the arena of politics simply because I am a Pastor.
Therefore, by the standard of the Left that would mean **Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.** should have stayed quiet on the issue of civil rights and equality in America because he was a **preacher** , and a large sum of his political speeches took place in... you guessed it = **CHURCHES**.
The hypocrisy of the Left is rooted in their ignorance of American history.
In 1504, **Christopher Columbus** said "_I was led of the Holy Spirit to carry the message of the Gospel to undiscovered lands_."
In the **Mayflower Compact** it is stated that they had come to America for "_the glory of God and the advancement of the Christian faith_."
The original thirteen colonies had charters that presented why they decided to form these new colonies.
The **Virginia Charter** states that the colony of Virginia was formed for the right of people to live in "_Christian peace_ " and instruct the people to "_Propagate the Christian religion to such people who yet live in ignorance of the true knowledge and worship of God_."
The **Delaware Charter** states that the colony of Delaware was formed "_To further propagate the Holy Gospel_."
America was formed to be a Christian nation with a divine purpose.
There are roughly **250 Founding Fathers** of the United States of America.
A Founding Father is an individual who had a _substantial impact_ on the birth and establishment of America.
Of the 250 Founding Fathers about 95% were strong Christians. That means 5% were not.
Two of the least religious were **Benjamin Franklin** and **Thomas Jefferson**.
It’s interesting that Franklin wanted the Bible taught in all schools in America. Even more interesting is that Jefferson as POTUS allowed a church to gather in the brand-new Capitol building in 1800. Not only that but Jefferson brought in the U.S. Military band to lead worship in the Capitol each Sunday.
But... Jefferson said, **"Separation of Church and State"**
Separation of Church and State is not about the Church staying out of the affairs of the State but rather the State staying out of the affairs of the Church.
This nation was built upon and flourished because of the Bible.
**George Washington** said, _"It is impossible to rightly govern a nation without God and the Bible."_
**John Adams** said, _"The destiny of America is to carry the gospel of Jesus Christ to all men everywhere. We Recognize No Sovereign but God, and no King but Jesus! I have examined all religions, and the result is that the Bible is the best book in the world."_
Why is America the most successful country ever? Because America chose God!
**To Make America Great Again we must first Make America Godly Again.**
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9604.1.b1eac00789d28acd2ee86fc3ea6f4d0e), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9605.1.029bde9d42a6a88825bebdc67a48ab2f), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9606.1.fdb112819b5054b3b1b33a3dc324af3a), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9607.1.c424ddee2f523299e364f523ad53717f), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9608.1.724ec198b88f998b55bce672e1e3ba1c) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9609.1.a2d67e196270bd09ecedd186aa358762)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9610.1.e052a30d24982491865fd7005fc4eff7)
---
## Rolling Stone Just Came After Me
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9611.1.3ed4e1a3ff24c2309bc3c111d4895d77)
---
The [Rolling Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9612.1.b29c3ba7899f9d9be431c8ea8697c4ec) released a VERY _vicious_ and _unfair_ hit piece on me and the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9613.1.0b75f9b0c1dffa5879e15f4cca63d3e4) organization.
Why did the [Rolling Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9614.1.925d38fd138883eb456a802779618b6e) do a feature story on me and [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9615.1.15c7b77900039c32a3f48b6fff904659)?
They know what we know. **If Pastors rally for President Trump then the largest voting bloc in America** (the Christian vote) **will rally behind President Trump and he will defeat the Democrat nominee in 2024 for the Presidency of the United States.**
Therefore, _radical left-wing pseudo-news outlets_ like the [Rolling Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9616.1.c5a79c10b4a168bce30dde22fdd6eacf) will continue coming after me and [Pastors for Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9617.1.39f5599c81bc703c18f6f4034a55c0e8) to try and stop the incredible momentum we have right now.
Here is what I know: **it will backfire on them**.
In 2021, the [Washington Post](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9618.1.df9fe0a579161e16f2f640ebb84b1883) (which is TOTAL trash) did a hit piece on me for signing [COVID19 religious exemptions](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9619.1.4a90cd544a003977254c9179110f2744) as the Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9620.1.b11be361ea40fe9e00617db7b74e9962) in Tulsa, OK.
That hit piece actually caused HUGE traffic to flood my website, [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9621.1.9301fe3e698f54e4d74c42bbf3555bf5), and propelled me to signing now over 60,000 [COVID19 religious exemption forms](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9622.1.d3cecdff5acd3fcaafd807a86cba449a) for Americans all across the country saving thousands of jobs.
If the [Washington Post](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9623.1.8f39cd25031243f1167350a07d0fa4b6) (which is TOTAL trash once again) would not have written a hit piece on me then I would have never been in a position to help over 60,000 Americans.
It reminds me of what Joseph said to his brothers in _Genesis 50:20_ , **"You intended to harm me, but God intended it for good to accomplish what is now being done, the saving of many lives."**
| | [ Rolling Stone Hit Piece On Lahmeyer ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9624.1.15f5c76df11d591df7d69e1e113a823e)

## This Will Cause Some Controversy...
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9625.1.fe84019bc7aa08552f1362ec9f7d37ee)
---
Today, the [Gateway Pundit](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9626.1.1b092355572e3876a270513414ddb5d9) published my Op-Ed on why I refuse to abandon **President Trump** as a Christian leader even though other Christian leaders are doing so.
In this Op-Ed, I make the case of _why_ Christians in America should support **Donald Trump** for the Presidency in 2024.
You can read the Op-Ed by visiting: [https://www.thegatewaypundit.com/2022/12/christian-leaders-abandoned-trump-refuse/](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9627.1.1e7b714c6c1f47ee4e0433e13e9f7293)

Last week, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9630.1.41bea7c1121c18c2552cf4d4fdba6d6d) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9631.1.15747c0197bd8dff6bfc1d1be0c65018)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9632.1.7fc401277e9319338ac645422bbf16d7) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9633.1.00275488b8072d4ea00b017c495a0a2e) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9634.1.ab7c69e0d41809d74265b3e32b057197) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9635.1.72ef4b7f52e49cc5ec11f18d4201684d) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9636.1.af9f933bdfba910d08968dc55974aba3) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16626970.9637.1.9d22fc393fbdcb86efc7d73a48f9f54a) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.

\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never
