name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Abbott shipped these kids to Washington, DC, on buses, in the freezing cold. As the National Immigration Law Center says, "seeking asylum is a human right--regardless of who you are and where you're from."
body:
Evil.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T193cd676-8ef7-423c-870b-197db2020e11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Unconscionable. Inexcusable. Evil. _Texas Governor Greg Abbott likes to call himself a Christian, he's closer to a devil. _ This morally scarred misanthrope, like many of his Republican brethren, likes to make a good show of Jesus' being his Savior. Yet, he apparently never read The Parable of the Good Samaritan, where his God commands Abbott to take care of those he finds penniless, harmed, lost and/or in need of sanctuary on the road. **_Abbott, being not simply a hypocrite, but a simmering, toxic ghoul, thrust poor, unsuspecting migrant children in t-shirts onto buses, sending them on an overnight journey to be dumped in front of the Vice President's home in Washington, D.C. in dangerously frigid temperatures. _** [**_Will you join us in helping those in need by giving $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to the NILC, who specifically help low-income immigrants and their families._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5eb7a6d4-d991-4775-a550-dd6c602a2e0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _On Christmas, Ya know, as his Savior would've done._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1c7946f-5fbf-4159-858f-8518341c49a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | No matter one's religion, or whether they practice any, _**it only takes knowing right from wrong and common decency to do the opposite of Abbott. To not purposely dump kids into the streets in temperatures that cause frostbite to exposed skin in minutes. **As the National Immigration Law Center (NILC) tweeted, "seeking asylum is a human right--regardless of who you are and where you're from."_ Damn right. [**_Let's be better--Far Better--than human oil-spill Abbott this holiday season. In the emergency situation he created, will you join us in helping those in need by giving $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to the NILC, who specifically help low-income immigrants and their families._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te3c32252-3c93-4a17-8382-24431238a0ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your kindness, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c1ff536149a4f618afff6a97313cdaa&_e=0Q2yHjarmLY7Wq_vxsAevF4NbOMSqmEICEvMbfxGdoaHit1QFov_kQzqyvsdQOb6POlG_3VaoiL4M0Omfbuhbzy0n92JmywqQ08HPccWKA2Rm5DWaP8SRH5DR3cY7rbJ-Dwb0qITmUBEYu0gp63jELYshiRo_LAbXH4Qa8pMBFBnR7YmIS8LFMOan2MZX-RVP0vEmEkV3fsoi0-8RQtCpKQbR56GpCucpMmXwTJjtzbIopuHJeSRvKnaAe9wpLCOr9kZXryGrNTyPqEEYSLTRt2Zzmmp3CxteKCgaqkh1NlBGKRsijK8Gp0bFwVzqHU1yBPhudpBqtCb7UioCBzocfkwl2we6zdSYnLe8eJyhPz2-4cxmdPkT_Elbk2f3QlL)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c1ff536149a4f618afff6a97313cdaa&_e=0Q2yHjarmLY7Wq_vxsAevF4NbOMSqmEICEvMbfxGdoaHit1QFov_kQzqyvsdQOb6POlG_3VaoiL4M0Omfbuhbzy0n92JmywqQ08HPccWKA2Rm5DWaP8SRH5DR3cY7rbJ-Dwb0qITmUBEYu0gp63jELYshiRo_LAbXH4Qa8pMBFBnR7YmIS8LFMOan2MZX-RVP0vEmEkV3fsoi0-8RQtCpKQbR56GpCucpMmXwTJjtzaOvIR5Yy2A7lseAxh6yoxSfkRhH3d5Wn9pGpflgGzFWICfBkPDk9AASwrI84EBzHIeAhSlshawtx6kCZ_lwaroymABP7p3Pi7fy2cpMlBQKRpX7Bd__-tAFsRLfvdtdnqjnFHx2SDGpKj1Uwt-BuzM)
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c1ff536149a4f618afff6a97313cdaa&_e=0Q2yHjarmLY7Wq_vxsAevF4NbOMSqmEICEvMbfxGdoaHit1QFov_kQzqyvsdQOb6POlG_3VaoiL4M0Omfbuhbzy0n92JmywqQ08HPccWKA2Rm5DWaP8SRH5DR3cY7rbJ-Dwb0qITmUBEYu0gp63jELYshiRo_LAbXH4Qa8pMBFBnR7YmIS8LFMOan2MZX-RVP0vEmEkV3fsoi0-8RQtCpKQbR56GpCucpMmXwTJjtzbtC_RuGgffrSqPbMn79D9WjSwM067rfbDlsNCBlUMZEd-81CZZUO-4P1M1glZPFwqezb8IzLO3Gejn7ZtqHU9u2S9uxjCMMgWtUiJRFJe_64Pa4avPUdU6Pvk_cZswQlcxTpPofmkPuPwUQNXMY9vG)

| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c1ff536149a4f618afff6a97313cdaa&_e=0Q2yHjarmLY7Wq_vxsAevF4NbOMSqmEICEvMbfxGdoaHit1QFov_kQzqyvsdQOb6POlG_3VaoiL4M0Omfbuhbzy0n92JmywqQ08HPccWKA2Rm5DWaP8SRH5DR3cY7rbJ-Dwb0qITmUBEYu0gp63jELYshiRo_LAbXH4Qa8pMBFBnR7YmIS8LFMOan2MZX-RVP0vEmEkV3fsoi0-8RQtCpKQbR56GpCucpMmXwTJjtzZSehJkmGna9i9dKH9QxPwiryPxyOxcnThMWvHAXkxiwTl6JENlSIZC0QzQo2RlD96FnGHzkniqiRHhbPxDH_tU4wDz-4uXw2pJx2SEjY7ZrCdWlTkm88_6D4x2O5DZxFks8GUiLWHO4FRpdK2Sl8Q4) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress

# **
The Fed's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92af655e83ae44d5a2e614622eb7991e&_e=mVXMIhGIx3BZsUDGLh4KIgtPfU0YhhU7N9Y2j0tROMPIlz_zCLtGjqnu-4txSD6ckNnG1hAPxMugT8IXBuS_l8_qRlvjUnaq9jdG3mirNhN9pdv8FmcXP_pkw60bFk6A-LvGUgnoAvAD95HxxMjWo907FNaI1PRg9VLlMNrMKtO49z7W0hMw_Ckm2NBujA7nv66oVH493Ya9lkgDk6wTQqM7NT78vQOlM9FEid2dlER8Ca9uM0-FNzAs91GKfT7f337HRHp4Dl3g-yt22SC1NSfUCZmn4d1I7mIdF4GWB_5w0sltN4m2hfpEVMFsyWRb).
**Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92af655e83ae44d5a2e614622eb7991e&_e=mVXMIhGIx3BZsUDGLh4KIgtPfU0YhhU7N9Y2j0tROMPIlz_zCLtGjqnu-4txSD6ckNnG1hAPxMugT8IXBuS_l8_qRlvjUnaq9jdG3mirNhN9pdv8FmcXP_pkw60bFk6A-LvGUgnoAvAD95HxxMjWo907FNaI1PRg9VLlMNrMKtNiwxnkgRSqFtA-Xv_uWSkQS99so2_f2bka7GUb1_YgPKo_6DNRbc8HG1BtchIr19Dy6rePp8rbp8J1T5tyPO_N-UKfhWRdzmO4ts7fYki8zw2ou_FGPjG1uX6aMTq0UwpONk-ZzR2cqsji-tE4bSBz) unless obtaining their approval at first.
Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a[ "Financial Rat-Lab"](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92af655e83ae44d5a2e614622eb7991e&_e=mVXMIhGIx3BZsUDGLh4KIgtPfU0YhhU7N9Y2j0tROMPIlz_zCLtGjqnu-4txSD6ckNnG1hAPxMugT8IXBuS_l8_qRlvjUnaq9jdG3mirNhN9pdv8FmcXP_pkw60bFk6A-LvGUgnoAvAD95HxxMjWo907FNaI1PRg9VLlMNrMKtPoRvBXQiCHOng2JEGAW5HOaFcGqUiMsJ_uUnHyp9iUXGN_VTdq501ae76v17CSqMfnUF-SAd5uqDZ5ycrz6VTAwiHNYMHN3f3l9fLdjv9JbQXihzBBZbXh6KMn5C2eAi4WSRFf5B1yxjBZEvlpdRSa). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **
Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92af655e83ae44d5a2e614622eb7991e&_e=mVXMIhGIx3BZsUDGLh4KIgtPfU0YhhU7N9Y2j0tROMPIlz_zCLtGjqnu-4txSD6ckNnG1hAPxMugT8IXBuS_l8_qRlvjUnaq9jdG3mirNhN9pdv8FmcXP_pkw60bFk6A-LvGUgnoAvAD95HxxMjWo907FNaI1PRg9VLlMNrMKtO8j5t5PVPEyQD8JpCsjr1ddzYcJiE_l3tNm3ff3aJ8XoNFJExDx2Uwdrff3mPkdZqQlw4qnIBCUq_kLt39iOeglKU8VHImvi3MwYY4ucgWRlx8TVTdXh-SX6pm0F23myxiIf60L_MiqgTFMhy2r-_9)

Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---

clean_body: | | | Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along: From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews. From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham. In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently. And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus! | | | The Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day. | | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to Pathway to Victory this month. And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31. To support the work God is doing through Pathway to Victory , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02dc713dd70f46fe86e5f6ad1e0ffc03&_e=F37oyQ1ARDarM2nUFchNOrC6-uYzzuLuQad1U_9kAEUN8_D1UTj5K3UUgPf_aZ4ieg4nngsdlvUax9VREG7Vww7HPDVwBk3eeWI9gDrlezavuial0OMbHVKluL8W1Vr88yhWBScynWoWLGNyZ8kRTQahX0NnT7HUYQh30UYei4555FdNINx8gFGJUA4FNI9DVeFIg1bcJrW4Ka0O7eDwYl-A9OV_ms93hSsWVjFnViYBNRR6i_YDLhkvDAwiXh8Y8zIhfvXX0JUExS41VdeMQLOm44kCgU1eN5iWkwPI51pmbi1B_UuUpJRGLA17Ikf8ohs3OuONAAb89bVsswzMCmAhgnvEy8K2hAx57wFGAAggw3AVohvh0xvtLFLe-yVSY5FRR-R-AR_rAY8vdwPcOQ%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cf5807eab8f406db96f99c21c9a347b&_e=8USPLTwib0jFGIoOjaTs7vPA678VhQRbfP2oJHOL4dfcM4hudnldVcLbF-_U-7KVnnmsMQjf1RrD5wYL8CmH7BDHWcfBkCbD_-BiYho1ZjT518XXQbEDXqMLsT9Z3vqvDz7LpoziYbNrd3Z2uBBOKFffFYtbUuBpfY2VE--WFBOoL4Q8eiI5zONAxHFeI7JLqY5Pc6DlteJHbgLqpCXpOYDMHdtnNWST8aP4F6HRAO3LYkmdfPDkZk6g-aHMD5pX-kIT-hjWS8zCXMo_aB6QR3eguvDvbfAEEZ7XjM06yMAGfNiz5277VfzuGzDFxgG6t4qwev244ux1bURpliq-GBCa6VH9gA5DJHyACvhqNmBJZ3lLCyDMFARAIr6O-A9CcLjld-AoXdE318s9DFEv8Q%3D%3D)

Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cf5807eab8f406db96f99c21c9a347b&_e=8USPLTwib0jFGIoOjaTs7vPA678VhQRbfP2oJHOL4dfcM4hudnldVcLbF-_U-7KVnnmsMQjf1RrD5wYL8CmH7BDHWcfBkCbD_-BiYho1ZjT518XXQbEDXqMLsT9Z3vqvDz7LpoziYbNrd3Z2uBBOKFffFYtbUuBpfY2VE--WFBOoL4Q8eiI5zONAxHFeI7JLqY5Pc6DlteJHbgLqpCXpOYDMHdtnNWST8aP4F6HRAO3LYkmdfPDkZk6g-aHMD5pXIfrk7lbmWv8kBnt20yBmR1Wn2Q_8lRhu618uSlbRt-AlUt16UilxCAZjxW_8U--a7Y7XZRN3LhtmMhAYBl_ZgiQoEJJ65emSLL14jWxGR2saD0DaMr6CEmUHf-29sOTflZjXQWFUJ8e549st_TmnOQ%3D%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cf5807eab8f406db96f99c21c9a347b&_e=8USPLTwib0jFGIoOjaTs7vPA678VhQRbfP2oJHOL4dfcM4hudnldVcLbF-_U-7KVnnmsMQjf1RrD5wYL8CmH7BDHWcfBkCbD_-BiYho1ZjT518XXQbEDXqMLsT9Z3vqvDz7LpoziYbNrd3Z2uBBOKFffFYtbUuBpfY2VE--WFBOoL4Q8eiI5zONAxHFeI7JLqY5Pc6DlteJHbgLqpCXpOYDMHdtnNWST8aP4F6HRAO3LYkmdfPDkZk6g-aHMD5pX7U5ouoMSaag0d75RW-zWB0NeehYj4M-fEsdMU14lKb4RYIZAw_LMVM1gXzxmjihOT8DZFLd_gMyDxybfTc2Rz-Zk6JEPz3yjKLNpUy-l5mDOd7fvBs-6yEOyyT-XSgaodibDimMLU0BjB0XfzZZkOw%3D%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

body:
This is why the fight for fair maps is not done.
|
---

We’re facing a big end-of-year fundraising goal, team.

**[President Obama said we can’t wait until the next census to care about redistricting -- and he asked for your support. Will you chip in $23?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56560643/385383535/1275189963?refcode=20221229_AOTL_F_eoy2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyY2MyNmQ3LTkxODctZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=idEY0cxnQYd-_2FxNxb-USNsdPPfBcQvm4HllXlj6Hs=)**

We are already facing challenges going into 2023:
➡️ Republicans in Ohio making it harder to pass voter-led ballot initiatives
➡️ Multiple maps still in violation of the Voting Rights Act
➡️ Extremists spreading their far-right, and far-fetched, ISL theory

**Here’s the good news:** This movement helped secure fairer maps. States with fairer maps like Pennsylvania and Michigan saw higher voter turnout than last midterm election!

**The bad news:** In the wake of that success, we’re already seeing map manipulators finding new ways to disempower voters. If we take a break from reforming redistricting and protecting voting rights, we won’t be able to catch up.

**[We have two days to reach our $23,000 goal. We’re hoping to get 12 people from your state to chip in today. subject: We paid for this already
body:
Grab your Complimentary Shoulder Holster now, before it’s too late.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/895e96b8401ed55afe543b97ca4c8b36503afb1c/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df) here at any time. December 29th, 2022 Please see the special promotion going on for Gun News USA subscribers from our sponsor below.
* * *
| | | | | | | \- We’re happy to tell you **we’ve paid the Full Price** of American Tactical Supply’s new “invisible” Shoulder Holster for you.

So you can own one of the 382 available Shoulder Holsters for FREE!

[Just click here to claim your complimentary Shoulder Holster today.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df)

We’re doing this as a **“No More Gun Control”** awareness campaign -- and to give a __big ol’ middle finger__ to Biden’s surge of insane new gun laws.

This is our #1 favorite holster.

It fits nearly all handguns...

It’s unbelievably comfortable...

And it’s so good at concealing guns... it can make a large frame pistol **disappear in plain sight.**

Plus, the fact [you can get it for $0.00 today](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df) is a huge selling point. ;)

The only problem is that there are a limited number available to give away.

Once they’re gone, you can still get one... **but you’ll have to pay full price**.

Right now, there are enough Free Shoulder Holsters [for the next 382 people who request on here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df).

After that, we can’t make any promises.

**[So HURRY and grab your Free Shoulder Holster now](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df)** , before it’s too late.

**Thank You.**

subject: I wanted to be first to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlsco9t7748gut6uqr2so7bipckd4dvg6esrv9t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpj68ob4clh2bs)
---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2fq6ofu9228u4ensloh4q1lfchplikqemam2lto_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpj68ob4clh2bs)

Best,

Kari Lake

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c4bc74dd22f45c69e4fe713dda76aa6&_e=n8Dq4GgwinzPjhgYBlSo3gWjLQ_TcH02pBFMxcw97p7L9-e6NSDo1LYoafuCQNkS8RYWiaSFH2oBRdWy8kxF-pPA3r8gFcurSDJmGxtQvGq64A8sMBTqAw-7hBsDZeDFdXifIRolcEb1lfOJgPgPIqakYvPFEqjCuFayrHTFaZ4em7B0UzheOwGVYDQyy3G4iaIgPz1OmgerJCpocyR-L1Mst6woNI3MJMwXJEMN25D6jE61ZDY1q9cZOeYPP1LQpWxLw_hHZVKPMXwsbETxGXoUT_53m2-PPNpEKj-DLql3BgysyOQhiuHkBM6I4t51)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c4bc74dd22f45c69e4fe713dda76aa6&_e=n8Dq4GgwinzPjhgYBlSo3gWjLQ_TcH02pBFMxcw97p7L9-e6NSDo1LYoafuCQNkS8RYWiaSFH2oBRdWy8kxF-pPA3r8gFcurSDJmGxtQvGq64A8sMBTqAw-7hBsDZeDFdXifIRolcEb1lfOJgPgPIqakYvPFEqjCuFayrHTFaZ7RU1IeqWK9zh6X06N7GrDPqg7UZfll5TUh_g-wE166MoYRRJ71Ic-lMfJypw90ylxn1_GMmSWcyJjM1YaAKPhTSVcoPnY5qTB16yJs4WZcRRB_JpMu3ryNHKdVa6cB2tvwaYYvTX1Jc0gWWL4sZ6b7)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c4bc74dd22f45c69e4fe713dda76aa6&_e=n8Dq4GgwinzPjhgYBlSo3gWjLQ_TcH02pBFMxcw97p7L9-e6NSDo1LYoafuCQNkS8RYWiaSFH2oBRdWy8kxF-pPA3r8gFcurSDJmGxtQvGq64A8sMBTqAw-7hBsDZeDFdXifIRolcEb1lfOJgPgPIqakYvPFEqjCuFayrHTFaZ4SBrpxsEq9zVgMDMokV24KmpLuncbQjz4YasVbUgcURMcQZx_IFaotP1D6zMzVSzGjmu5Hmgod-EzWY1QFnWWe_HtnwNY_gu6n4vBsXR-7LXXFVtl5Oc2SJ5FBzE-tM4qNUGleywmijKTPUOJryu-k)

name: Kari Lake
subject: I wanted to be first to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7i2gsiq0q92iaprqgb89lrp4rjoricoh4juoae0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpj6coj6c1h2bs)
---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdhvipc8lknglua9d09hadis6h0rdlm71va7vva0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpj6coj6c1h2bs)

Best,

Kari Lake

body:
| Hi — Just bumping Dan’s email. We’ve got a major filing deadline — our first since Dan won his decisive victory last month — and we need your support to have a strong report when our numbers go public.

With Republicans set to take control of the House next month, we need to show that Democrats are engaged and energized to fight for our priorities and take back the House in 2024.

Please contribute at the link below, then read Dan’s message.

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/dec22-deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56565333/385401290/1325829060?amount=15&contactdata=s%2BjpODTEd65b8R21vsY7%2Fb2616g8rKh87pWti7hOqpzjc23PO3Xr8Oir7heZqcQ%2FX2uZwweEPY96u1yQuVCRLyD6Z%2B68zgzFs3OLRXWIDZAzgyZyaJvrdSh73SrmxxSlGFeJn7NzhX%2Fk61EwFDCaWg%3D%3D&refcode2=f2c89ca4-9b87-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&source=EM_NBI_DK_20221229_FR_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_fec&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmM4OWNhNC05Yjg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vvQ4J-PAIj4dWgoA6Zif5a-dAJohd7XNSVI6mdNZ-5Q=)**

Thanks,
All of us @ Dan Kildee for Congress

* * *
**_Dan’s Message:_**

Hi, it’s Dan. Your support helped us have a decisive victory in last month’s election. Despite running in a Republican-leaning district, we won thanks to incredible grassroots supporters like you.

We also won because we knew the race would be competitive and we made early investments in our organizing and outreach efforts. Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing.

**Our first step to making early investments in this race is to have another strong Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly report when our fundraising numbers go public at the end of the month.** That's right — we’ve already got another fundraising deadline coming up!

Our grassroots supporters helped us have consistently strong reports leading up to our election last month, and now I’m asking you to help us do it again.

**[Will you contribute $15 or any amount ahead of our public filing deadline on December 31?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56565334/385401291/1325829060?amount=15&contactdata=s%2BjpODTEd65b8R21vsY7%2Fb2616g8rKh87pWti7hOqpzjc23PO3Xr8Oir7heZqcQ%2FX2uZwweEPY96u1yQuVCRLyD6Z%2B68zgzFs3OLRXWIDZAzgyZyaJvrdSh73SrmxxSlGFeJn7NzhX%2Fk61EwFDCaWg%3D%3D&refcode2=f2c89ca4-9b87-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&source=EM_NBI_DK_20221229_FR_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_fec&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmM4OWNhNC05Yjg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vvQ4J-PAIj4dWgoA6Zif5a-dAJohd7XNSVI6mdNZ-5Q=)**
_If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly._ | | [DONATE $8 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56565335/385401292/1325829060?amount=8&express_lane=true&contactdata=s%2BjpODTEd65b8R21vsY7%2Fb2616g8rKh87pWti7hOqpzjc23PO3Xr8Oir7heZqcQ%2FX2uZwweEPY96u1yQuVCRLyD6Z%2B68zgzFs3OLRXWIDZAzgyZyaJvrdSh73SrmxxSlGFeJn7NzhX%2Fk61EwFDCaWg%3D%3D&refcode2=f2c89ca4-9b87-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&source=EM_NBI_DK_20221229_FR_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_fec&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmM4OWNhNC05Yjg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vvQ4J-PAIj4dWgoA6Zif5a-dAJohd7XNSVI6mdNZ-5Q=)

clean_body: | Hi — Just bumping Dan’s email. We’ve got a major filing deadline — our first since Dan won his decisive victory last month — and we need your support to have a strong report when our numbers go public. With Republicans set to take control of the House next month, we need to show that Democrats are engaged and energized to fight for our priorities and take back the House in 2024. Please contribute at the link below, then read Dan’s message. = Thanks, All of us @ Dan Kildee for Congress Dan’s Message: Hi, it’s Dan. Your support helped us have a decisive victory in last month’s election. Despite running in a Republican-leaning district, we won thanks to incredible grassroots supporters like you. We also won because we knew the race would be competitive and we made early investments in our organizing and outreach efforts. Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing. Our first step to making early investments in this race is to have another strong Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly report when our fundraising numbers go public at the end of the month. That's right — we’ve already got another fundraising deadline coming up! Our grassroots supporters helped us have consistently strong reports leading up to our election last month, and now I’m asking you to help us do it again. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly. | | = | = | = | = | = | = The work we do now will make all the difference as we prepare for another competitive race in 2024. If you can, please make a contribution today to support our efforts. = Thank you so much, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

I don't know about you, but we care about our thumbs!
And we want to help you spend more time shootin' and less time loadin' magazines... **WAY less time.**
This thing loads a full mag in about **20 seconds flat...**
Load 9mm or .40 S&W, this bad boy eats em up!
Some people are saying I'm crazy for handing out 500 of these bad boys but I say the best type of advertising is word of mouth!

clean_body: I've got a little present for you... | | | | | | | WE GOT YOUR 6. | | | | | | | I've got a little present for you. Listen, we just got our first shipment of in the warehouse... And I'm so pumped about it, we are giving away the first 500 for NOTHING but a small shipping and handling charge. I don't know about you, but we care about our thumbs! And we want to help you spend more time shootin' and less time loadin' magazines... WAY less time. This thing loads a full mag in about 20 seconds flat... Load 9mm or .40 S&W, this bad boy eats em up! Some people are saying I'm crazy for handing out 500 of these bad boys but I say the best type of advertising is word of mouth! P.S. Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point — that’s just not an option.**

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona’s November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I’m not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you — I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.
**However, I need to know — do I have your support?** | [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1c7f199ea51441bfb2377cbd2eb80d47&_e=VFBlbDnedLfeP8Xk7AwwBHrJEFzYEU7-zj32gtWBQU16EBjy-jvcnHZYy4a7UDL-hANMNUBsXGjuZ2nbL0XK1n2qRi7CgNAFAwfi_A3aUIIw5y-49IbpXucrPu1WCbebDq7RZxAVhLYuR5uYvJ1-P8nMD-zc_gRod7F90Jo3UOE6tzJeh604p4VaNmfZk-CWr2wWPfaOavcmz62SSREDq29F4rIAvz-wae1VnNR5zU-k9UH5UXi8JOcUBOkwPjPU6YbcmEz8x4X2w8Hv6yilC7w2wAISy3Pq5touS8UbESUEXVTra_YsMlvEs_xLimYx3C1sMB1ThWDENLA2z4QrXYuEbynXwpoLj9vKlCefdfVQWZmOhpBCMtf6Ce5RD6BCqdW7fYLAebzdiXHFS7AdRCSoj5Qvzcd5glmJBiO3F6SqUB50Ieo7zoTHdTiVUgA5CcjLU3vqabtJr36NrgYQtbq5YF6xXa9QTEDGn-RDJzk_BPkwAXUmfeAydJSGfTBA6m9OhZmx_X6QaIoufwHnyaAoMGwX_6xtTJhhfu6fGCIBscsZI2FQesLifaQGwn-P)

subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7dd7feed351f497f837abdb9f5c69794&_e=UD77Z_NNQRqhvEiUq87Ei1_aS2LLKfCY9BB8krksEHbSlj_xkxIyAJUT400FhTPsGYrapwPS02lYSTfhRiWyi7HOL_XZu4w7zYDuprZczL27QxxEB3dA5LTy4QEz2jjYXFKROzQOoggqMrw3ejbFYy9lM4GciK2PahvePHjaQjTRHDJO_YGeVULfUtSvFf-qA4U2wi7eIRh1eaq3JB8rTlHtcSH9y5SII5KyEDEHDS-vFtqa5WiTGrLMISyQYwG4pHn_C2-4YkZL4XAEFoXgoprav6T2boxZ1j8GE2dL9ADiJE9UrbCXKMogk2-wmsPUB2XtzWjDf6xlnxUumajSAqSDD2Og3ijIsjIHO380rXZvIE9ANH5Pt8HvrW4p5Hl3)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7dd7feed351f497f837abdb9f5c69794&_e=UD77Z_NNQRqhvEiUq87Ei1_aS2LLKfCY9BB8krksEHbSlj_xkxIyAJUT400FhTPsGYrapwPS02lYSTfhRiWyi7HOL_XZu4w7zYDuprZczL27QxxEB3dA5LTy4QEz2jjYXFKROzQOoggqMrw3ejbFYy9lM4GciK2PahvePHjaQjTRHDJO_YGeVULfUtSvFf-qA4U2wi7eIRh1eaq3JB8rTlHtcSH9y5SII5KyEDEHDS_YkPMMqZ0T0PexuFrDHU0b2VcUOZtdyyHr0xOT8_UM_Ucwu3q9wMtYUEBHvjOwfPGYss40i-YIO8Ai8WPjTh6ZJkBLq_c4vnARFWtJf0t3ZPqoZVvRUBkjdVbviBxcO4F-M5y1q3y4SdwvyFzB8nUz)

| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7dd7feed351f497f837abdb9f5c69794&_e=UD77Z_NNQRqhvEiUq87Ei1_aS2LLKfCY9BB8krksEHbSlj_xkxIyAJUT400FhTPsGYrapwPS02lYSTfhRiWyi7HOL_XZu4w7zYDuprZczL27QxxEB3dA5LTy4QEz2jjYXFKROzQOoggqMrw3ejbFYy9lM4GciK2PahvePHjaQjTRHDJO_YGeVULfUtSvFf-qA4U2wi7eIRh1eaq3JB8rTlHtcSH9y5SII5KyEDEHDS8Pq7Pb0y1p6Iv9kx-kBZ_f3AMD1Ah0lWdwQtZ0tCSXk1WDWkwFCq1TfMOuySJOdJwwwrMvg-SoMoBHFIH0LuWzledaSyqAT1tv2Ch1h7Nk1gi1PykS3TROUOytj8YYvK7OolgOw8g8cNGobFv02LP7) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election. Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all. They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting. I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath. However, I need to know -- do I have your support? | Best, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: How I'm going to make it happen | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, I 'm officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress. If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy... My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge. | | | | Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he'll stab us in the back every chance he gets. For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game. I'll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most. We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden's radicalism and BREAK the Establishment's stranglehold on this nation. McCarthy won 't fight for us...so we've got to do it ourselves. But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. | | | | | | | | | Yours in Freedom, Andy Biggs Republican Congressman, AZ-5 | | | | Paid for by Biggs for Congress Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Derek, 2022 is a year worth celebrating. Senate Democrats delivered on powerful promises to the American people: lower prescription drug prices, historic investment in our nation’s infrastructure, and no tax increases for hard-working families. But it’s also been a stark reminder that our work is never over. Our democracy is still under attack, reproductive freedoms are at risk, and middle class Americans are still struggling to make ends meet. _[**December 31 is our final end-of-quarter deadline of 2022. Now is our chance to celebrate this year and get a head start on the challenges ahead in 2023. | | As I reflect on 2022, I am proud of the work that we have done for the American people. We came together for the common good. [**Will you help us finish 2022 strong with a year-end gift of $3?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56568972/385410089/-2044921950?refcode=2022-12-29-yearreview&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=7142a04b-a487-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQyYTA0Yi1hNDg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tExk0LAwnkxi-67euxjwP4OEzSwgirhJQG4dY8xc7nA=) **Democrats promised big, bold change on some of the most pressing challenges facing American families, and I'm proud to say we delivered.** From tackling the climate crisis to holding corporations accountable for not paying their fair share, to lowering drug costs for seniors and protecting marriage equality (and much more), this year showed us what's possible with a strong Democratic majority in Congress. **But one of the greatest victories in 2022 came on election night and the days that followed.** Together, we defended our democracy. That's no small feat. Despite MAGA Republicans polluting our discourse with dysfunction, spite, cruelty, and lies, **Americans elected good, honest, compassionate leaders to represent them.** The American people decisively chose leaders who want to build on the progress we've made, not turn back the clock on our constitutional freedoms. **And none of that would have been possible without your support of our grassroots movement.** We have a long way to go in 2023 and a lot of work to do to defeat far-right extremism, but I'm in this fight all the way. [**So before the year closes, will you join in this powerful movement and give $3?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56568975/385410090/-2044921950?refcode=2022-12-29-yearreview&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=7142a04b-a487-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQyYTA0Yi1hNDg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tExk0LAwnkxi-67euxjwP4OEzSwgirhJQG4dY8xc7nA=) clean_body: | | | | As I reflect on 2022, I am proud of the work that we have done for the American people. We came together for the common good. = Democrats promised big, bold change on some of the most pressing challenges facing American families, and I'm proud to say we delivered. From tackling the climate crisis to holding corporations accountable for not paying their fair share, to lowering drug costs for seniors and protecting marriage equality (and much more), this year showed us what's possible with a strong Democratic majority in Congress. But one of the greatest victories in 2022 came on election night and the days that followed. Together, we defended our democracy. That's no small feat. Despite MAGA Republicans polluting our discourse with dysfunction, spite, cruelty, and lies, Americans elected good, honest, compassionate leaders to represent them. The American people decisively chose leaders who want to build on the progress we've made, not turn back the clock on our constitutional freedoms. And none of that would have been possible without your support of our grassroots movement. We have a long way to go in 2023 and a lot of work to do to defeat far-right extremism, but I'm in this fight all the way. = Let's finish this year strong. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. Hillsdale College | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2559ba25dcbb4e0580aaa2ead5419564&_e=Nc7ch4fdXwVOOphWMdZYi9YG_86nq7Y-JuUTU7m-nNIdDnUjv2lYHYMmvSIVX5fnmHKRIKUgCV4tF_hNRsEVUxD29rbAQQJBorwga3tEn_J_bk7MFpEpHB9C1LcpvYI37hqWRYgU_NBCS8zqOCDbL-zX6FMu6MCLZdncdmriwvrph5jSXc3RIxxxLDEQvve2pb8V8LSsnx1442EuoDkdqVsZIh9Aop_yZu22_FmR2jKkQykCrXrYr357zTB2alEmbyvkpy8gwlD8AXTjAtVrGhc0uv3XFmwcz-5h0_lIQk76sbfWNbO-i0SmfguQiGVIh6yA1h912ba1eFAlaTsx8a3-uzhNT6sfEc5pH7_vmA60YUGrJ5PdrbNxuNGnR1PgbyX-WN0kZvqrVTZTvFXMYQ%3D%3D) Fellow American, [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2559ba25dcbb4e0580aaa2ead5419564&_e=Nc7ch4fdXwVOOphWMdZYi9YG_86nq7Y-JuUTU7m-nNIdDnUjv2lYHYMmvSIVX5fnmHKRIKUgCV4tF_hNRsEVUxD29rbAQQJBorwga3tEn_J_bk7MFpEpHB9C1LcpvYI37hqWRYgU_NBCS8zqOCDbL-zX6FMu6MCLZdncdmriwvrph5jSXc3RIxxxLDEQvve2pb8V8LSsnx1442EuoDkdqVsZIh9Aop_yZu22_FmR2jKkQykCrXrYr357zTB2alEmPdSnQX4n4rDusvS-NBls4TjphapoXUobB2AT4rNTRE2EzQz1Mm29INSmVQmf_B1la2veKFI9qx4JDEMFtDIxgU4b8j8BDQfBnXo85SAip-sCtP78rpHxNyy6FOtfPmqeXsubvKQm3fgwzoiOXC8XRQ%3D%3D) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2559ba25dcbb4e0580aaa2ead5419564&_e=Nc7ch4fdXwVOOphWMdZYi9YG_86nq7Y-JuUTU7m-nNIdDnUjv2lYHYMmvSIVX5fnmHKRIKUgCV4tF_hNRsEVUxD29rbAQQJBorwga3tEn_J_bk7MFpEpHB9C1LcpvYI37hqWRYgU_NBCS8zqOCDbL-zX6FMu6MCLZdncdmriwvrph5jSXc3RIxxxLDEQvve2pb8V8LSsnx1442EuoDkdqVsZIh9Aop_yZu22_FmR2jKkQykCrXrYr357zTB2alEmlmD6XqtriuKCLAYmgQYt7cATD8Xq-v-CUPp9XaRxILIsxXWEAMD2Y0kkjqbQ0kUWkDc1MvP8GFn9HZHQ5wfmKKHP1gModh_6Xp-RsRQbwlcZ6pIoqHxMaQd77BYvl0U50kGogHfHZCXGQvgxNFniSQ%3D%3D) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2559ba25dcbb4e0580aaa2ead5419564&_e=Nc7ch4fdXwVOOphWMdZYi9YG_86nq7Y-JuUTU7m-nNIdDnUjv2lYHYMmvSIVX5fnmHKRIKUgCV4tF_hNRsEVUxD29rbAQQJBorwga3tEn_J_bk7MFpEpHB9C1LcpvYI37hqWRYgU_NBCS8zqOCDbL-zX6FMu6MCLZdncdmriwvrph5jSXc3RIxxxLDEQvve2pb8V8LSsnx1442EuoDkdqVsZIh9Aop_yZu22_FmR2jKkQykCrXrYr357zTB2alEmwBVoo1gqGFBcRFlHmqX7d5agGXmCh8ggi_o7cZ0cqesEYITsBSi8Z2j2GK5Sr-8N2yPTDMsszrn3--vSCxgwcjKeAjGgx_xTFfm0YNI4Qpp2tvnzkuZL1MTdtjEVzQNO7wXdxpYyeJamJqsY6yj8SQ%3D%3D) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2559ba25dcbb4e0580aaa2ead5419564&_e=Nc7ch4fdXwVOOphWMdZYi9YG_86nq7Y-JuUTU7m-nNIdDnUjv2lYHYMmvSIVX5fnmHKRIKUgCV4tF_hNRsEVUxD29rbAQQJBorwga3tEn_J_bk7MFpEpHB9C1LcpvYI37hqWRYgU_NBCS8zqOCDbL-zX6FMu6MCLZdncdmriwvrph5jSXc3RIxxxLDEQvve2pb8V8LSsnx1442EuoDkdqVsZIh9Aop_yZu22_FmR2jKkQykCrXrYr357zTB2alEmOzYkzlauPCDSgj17uFmSAJDYybD5A4lWD_oqSdc6e2jx-V7addHgHsPhWudLKd1Ry505swqLJqkmxTzVhrX_Wrh9NUqOQD42NQcSvLp-P4MKhEDiFC-djvSzkpJuZVucTSwYur9jIDdU_IS75ha0eg%3D%3D) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Team Slotkin
subject: How the Formidable Five fared in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12292022 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12292022]
Team,
If you’ve been following our campaign this last year, you probably remember our emails about The Formidable Five, the five Democratic members of the House – Cindy Axne (IA-03), Matt Cartwright (PA-08), Jared Golden (ME-02), Andy Kim (NJ-03), and Elissa – that all won districts that Donald Trump won in 2020.
We wanted to provide an update on those candidates now that the 2022 election is over. And the results show us that while we might not always be successful, there are still red-leaning districts out there willing to elect both Republicans and Democrats.
Reps. Cartwright, Golden and Kim all won their races. Unfortunately, Elissa's friend Rep. Axne lost by less than one percentage point – still an incredibly impressive margin in a district and state trending red.
And in a testament to how much Democrats and Republicans care about these seats, all of The Formidable Five were consistently listed among the most expensive districts across the country. Here in Michigan, Elissa was at the very top of that list.
What we know is that strong candidates who are well-reasoned gave us the best chance to hold on to tough seats. Thanks again for all you did to help Elissa, and all of The Formidable Five. It mattered.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12292022]
Team Slotkin

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she was elected to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Here's the deal, friend: **Experts say Nevada __ could once again decide Senate control in 2024, so I need your help.**
This year, my friend Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto faced over $55 MILLION in GOP spending – and she won her hard-fought race to keep Nevada blue by _less than 1_ _percentage point_.
With all eyes on Nevada, you can bet that Mitch McConnell and the GOP will flood the next election cycle with millions to defeat me, and I'm going to need every bit of grassroots support to fight back and win. **That's why we can't afford to miss our final $50,000 end-of-quarter goal – not if we're going to kick our reelection** **campaign off strong.**

Peter,
It’s almost the end of the year, which means that politicians and PACs are trying to raise as much as possible before the FEC deadline on December 31st.
That means Kyrsten Sinema is calling up her biggest donors right now – like private equity billionaires and Big Pharma lobbyists – asking them to make a contribution before the end of the year.
Unlike Sinema, we’re not powered by Wall Street or corporations. | Peter,
---
| It's impossible to overstate how critical it is that our movement closes out the year strong...
We stand no chance at installing the MAGA Agenda and carrying out impeachments of the corrupt criminals in the Biden Regime unless we can close out this year with MOMENTUM!
You can make a rapid impact on our movement by following this link: [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/fight](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ak7toH__AiCzcbb2DIpZO0OvS8aY7tCrWNlpxXmTD-4D-Cfa0fuTlDSW2BCBdRVvxLrPlE-97lu9oob88INrr7f04qRJKOsfYDQlCl_6SI73MAfyt1MpSjz_aFn4hmpvSmJPsavAZaoTJPiWvWj5OPl9FAUyCo6HPhgyJCasRETphAllgk_eEG8Ldl6jbCWf_mkzePziGt2-ESqmRS1vvb_YfuVu5K0n&c=UWDIPkEIEsQibXF3kCl_kiy4H1GwjKLlc_Q2t99wlrRVrwZbMQDtkw==&ch=CcqIdSBqSnNHIuxloUxvxf8qmJmn_g4AMPmBuLZ6d-PYQcVwFiuJjQ==)
The actions Republicans take in our Majority next year, Peter, just might determine whether we save our country, or whether it is lost forever at the hands of America-Last tyrants.
And so with so much at stake, there are two things that we absolutely CANNOT afford right now:

1. To have anything less than our 'A Team' leading the 118th Congress, and;
2. To head into the new year without the proper reinforcements and strength behind our mission.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: EXCLUSIVE: Illinois Review revelations prompt reaction
body:
Entrepreneur and businessman Gary Rabine responds to recent revelations that the IL GOP provided discounted postage for the Irvin campaign.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/5ad03890ed04/exclusive-illinois-review-revelations-prompt-reaction?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Rabine: Don Tracy and the IL GOP Should Reimburse Gubernatorial Candidates for Postage (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/rabine-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-should-reimburse-gubernatorial-candidates-for-postage.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

By Gary Rabine

Running for any office, especially for governor of the 5th largest state in America is expensive. And for the candidates who didn’t have a billionaire writing giant checks, many of us funded our campaigns with our own, hard-earned money.

Growing up, we didn’t have a lot of money, but my parents taught us something much more valuable than fancy possessions: that if you have a strong work ethic, you are disciplined and accountable, then the sky’s the limit in this amazing free country.

So as an 18-year-old man with a few thousand dollars I began in the driveway maintenance business by knocking on doors in Northern Illinois. And over time, I worked hard with my team to build this little company into one of the largest parking lot paving companies in America.

Today I have over a dozen companies under the Rabine Group, and we do business in all fifty states. But it took literally, blood, sweat and tears to get there.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/rabine-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-should-reimburse-gubernatorial-candidates-for-postage.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The decision to run for governor was not an easy one, and it took lots of time consulting with family and friends. My family and businesses would be an automatic target by our political enemies, and so I wanted to make sure I was making the right decision.

Protecting my family was my number one priority – even above running for an office as important as governor.

Our state is in so much trouble.

Crime is skyrocketing; over 100,000 residents leave our state annually taking billions of dollars of tax revenue with them; high taxes are killing homeowners and businesses; and our economy is now one of the worst in the country.

Much worse than that, we have a governor who’s abusing his COVID-19 emergency powers and acting more like a dictator than a representative of, “we the people.”

That’s why I was one of the lead plaintiffs who sued the Biden Administration, challenging the constitutionality of their employer vaccine mandate – a mandate that would have impacted over 80 million hard working Americans.

We never gave up the fight – taking our case all the way to the US Supreme Court.

And we won on ** Jan 14, 2022 (https://www.usnews.com/news/health-news/articles/2022-01-14/supreme-court-blocks-bidens-vaccine-mandate-for-large-employers?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D#:~:text=FRIDAY%2C%20Jan.,conservative%20majority%20on%20the%20court.)
.

But that shared victory came at a price, and I’m not talking about a monetary price, although that was expensive too.

Since that Supreme Court victory, I have been the target of “cancel culture,” audits and lawsuits. But those attempts to silence me only strengthened my resolve to fight harder and do what’s right for the people of Illinois and the country as a whole.

And so, when I learned in a recent ** Illinois Review article (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
that IL GOP chairman Don Tracy allowed so-called Republican Richard Irvin’s campaign – the same man who pulled ** Democratic Primary ballots (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1471589397552320517?s=61&t=qvemzT8IO73m1zq4FhPDcA&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in 2014, 2016 and 2020 to use the IL GOP postage discount for his mailers, I was angry.

While the rest of us were out on the campaign trail, spending our own hard-earned money to get our messages out, the Irvin campaign, funded by billionaire Ken Griffin, was getting preferred postage discounts compliments of the IL GOP.

This is outrageous.

During my primary campaign I felt Don Tracy’s leadership was weak for not taking a stand against the IL GOP’s preferential treatment for Richard Irvin.

For example, at the August 2021 State Fair in Springfield, the Republican candidates for governor were not allowed to speak. Not coincidentally, Irvin entered the race just a few months after the State Fair.

At the ** Sangamon County Lincoln Day Dinner (https://www.tazewellgop.org/sangamon_ldd?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in April 2022, Richard Irvin was a no-show, and once again myself and the other Republican candidates for governor were not allowed to speak.

Turning Point USA Founder Charlie Kirk was the main speaker at the Lincoln Day Dinner – and prior to taking the stage, Kirk was asked not to mention my name as he often does during speeches – as I’m one of the original founders of TPUSA and the candidate for governor of Illinois whom Kirk had endorsed.

But it was okay for Irvin’s Lt. Gov. candidate Avery Bourne to go on stage and pitch the 1,000-plus in attendance on why they should vote for her and lifelong Democrat Richard Irvin in the Republican primary.

** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/rabine-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-should-reimburse-gubernatorial-candidates-for-postage.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Illinois Lt. Gov. candidate and Richard Irvin running mate Avery Bourne addressing the Sangamon County Lincoln Day Dinner at the Bank of Springfield Center on April 19, 2022. (Photo credit: Avery Bourne / Twitter)

** (https://twitter.com/AveryBourne/status/1516839190838726660?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Now that I have learned that Don Tracy only allowed Irvin’s campaign to use the IL GOP postage discount proves that he was either bullied by former House GOP leader Jim Durkin and IL GOP national committeeman ** Richard Porter (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-national-committeemans-law-firm-donated-to-biden-harris.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
or bought by their billionaire backer, Ken Griffin.

And so, I am calling on Don Tracy and the IL GOP to reimburse every 2022 Republican gubernatorial campaign in the primary for their postage. Including my campaign.

The ** collusion between the Irvin campaign and the IL GOP (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/the-big-lie-how-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-supported-democrat-richard-irvins-primary-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
is a disgrace, and our leaders should be held accountable – in addition to reimbursing our campaigns for postage.

In February, ** Tracy (https://www.theillinoize.com/articles/some-gop-operatives-believe-irvin?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
had this to say,

“The Illinois Republican Party has been neutral and will always be neutral in the GOP primary for governor. Any accusation that we are coordinating with a particular campaign is absolutely false and I find it personally offensive to suggest otherwise.”

So much for Don Tracy and the Illinois Republican Party staying neutral during the Primary. The postage discount, among other things, proves otherwise.

Gary Rabine is an entrepreneur and businessman. In 2022, he ran in the Illinois primary as a Republican candidate for governor.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0afdab60c6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_28_08_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0afdab60c6-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Email (mailto:articles@illinoisreview.com)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Unintended pregnancy is a lead cause of extreme mother & child poverty, which can cause lifelong trauma to children or set off a vicious, downward spiral of financial catastrophe for entire families. You can help women take control of their reproductive decisions right now, protecting their ability to increase their families only when they’re ready.
body:
stop this vicious cycle
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taaff9c33-fa44-4101-8891-c5e73561f101/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, With dangerously cold temperatures enveloping much of the country, and travel made much more difficult, we want to do anything we can to help those who are suffering. __After the cruel Dobbs decision by the Supreme Court, we're naturally thinking of pregnant women forced to become mothers, even though it sends their families into poverty. Or hiding from those reading their social media posts and spying on their behavior in anti-abortion police-states, all to turn them into Republican Big Brother running their local or state government in the hope of collecting some kind of sick bounty.__ _This is where the National Network of Abortion Funds (NNAF) steps in. They ensure that women, no matter their geography, gerrymandered state legislature, economic status or any other factors have access to their most basic right--control of their bodies. _ **_An unplanned pregnancy is often a significant factor in dire, intractable family poverty, and economic insecurity so severe that it causes children lifelong trauma. Giving women back control over their reproductive futures can help entire families, and in the end it helps all of us live in stronger, more stable communities._** [**Can you give $5, $10, $25 or more to the NNAF to ensure these women don't become cautionary statistics, but thrive?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ac0eab3-f937-4d8f-a863-b3abe7346f76/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | **__The Network helps with financial costs of the procedure, childcare, travel, translation (if necessary) and a place to stay. They are truly doing the work of the angels, continuing a long tradition that includes the underground railroad, to help those whom our government has abandoned or is actively trying to harm. __** **_Let's just be decent human beings--let that guide us as we care for others in the very same manner we'd hope they'd care for us, if we found ourselves in a similarly desperate, heartbreaking situation._** [**Can you give $5, $10, $25 or more to the NNAF to ensure these women don't become cautionary statistics, but thrive?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce6e45f6-4109-427a-a94e-69a3242a365e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your compassion, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28ab4e64-1226-43bd-a728-cc6b3576b1e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
#

Friends — we have some good news and some better news.
**The good news is:** Our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2022 is coming up on Saturday and we’re so close to hitting our goals.
**The better news is:** We still have 48 hours to go and with your support, we’re confident we’ll end this year on a high note and be in a great position for 2023.
Since day one, this team has been powered by generous folks like you who give $5, $10 or even $25 to emails just like this to support Mark.
So, before the deadline on Saturday, we have to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make your first $3 donation before our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2022? The amount you donate isn’t as important as the donation itself because this has always been a people-powered team.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec22.rUmYtQ&refcode=em221229-1-7&t=1&akid=4863%2E6688874%2EWCW_NK)

**[ _ARIZONA JUDGE RULES AGAINST KARI LAKE 'S ELECTION LAWSUIT_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znqaeqg7atfgds0ood1jsffhrm0urbrcsphvun80_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpgm0ob2clh2bs)**

Patriot,

We have an urgent update from Team Lake.

An Arizona judge has ruled against Kari's election lawsuit, but this trial was never the end all be all of this fight. This was always just the beginning.

**We will APPEAL, and we will bring this lawsuit all the way to the steps of the Supreme Court if need be.**

Kari's finalizing our plans with the most formidable team of election lawyers this country has ever seen. [**BUT we 're going to need your help, Friend, if we're going to be able to finish this fight.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8k7r39c63g1e07j00anop8eh39ru0v1h8pkn09g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cpgm0ob2clh2bs)

This judge may not have ruled in our favor, but we have faith in the American justice system. It's not too late to make things right.

Look, we were victorious in so many critical races last month, and the reason we won is because grassroots supporters like you didn’t give up.

We can’t sit on the sidelines now. Because the midterms were so much closer than anyone anticipated, campaigns are already making decisions about 2024. We need to make sure we do everything in our power now to ensure voting rights and partisan gerrymandering don’t stop us.

**President Obama has issued a call to action, Peter. Are you going to answer it?**

If we learned anything in the midterms, it’s that control of both chambers of Congress came down to just a few races and just a few votes. We did much better than expected in districts across the country, and if we push even more, we can ensure we take back the House.

We need to gather 50,000 signatures by MIDNIGHT so we can send the letter first thing in the morning. CHIP IN $7 TO SIGN NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37741?t=6&akid=5926%2E878179%2EY0hFnP) | [DONATE $7 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37741?t=7&akid=5926%2E878179%2EY0hFnP)

**To: Rep. Jamie Raskin**
**From: A strong Democrat** Dear Congressman Raskin,

I can't thank you enough for your hard work over the years and on the January 6 Committee to condemn far-right extremism in our country.

Thanks to the evidence you've revealed, we're one step closer to finally holding Trump and his MAGA traitors accountable for their crimes in the horrific January 6 insurrection.

**I know it isn 't easy standing up to vicious GOP attacks, but your bravery and leadership is _exactly_ what our nation needs right now.** [**So today, I 'm signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to thank you for your heroic efforts and to keep electing incredible leaders like you. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37741?t=8&akid=5926%2E878179%2EY0hFnP) | [DONATE $7 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37741?t=9&akid=5926%2E878179%2EY0hFnP)

We would love to see you there | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/214bb283c873/youre-invited-wesley-hunt-swearing-in-ceremony?e=6b59dbf13a)

| | Friend,

I would like to invite you to my Congressional Swearing-In Ceremony on **Saturday, January 7th at 2 PM at Champions Forest Baptist Church**! This very special Ceremony will be led by Judge Lincoln Goodwin, with a special invocation given by Pastor Jarrett Stephens.

During my campaign, I vowed to take Houston's conservative values to Washington, and I will honor that pledge, starting with taking my oath of office right here in Congressional District 38. I look forward to seeing you there!

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt
