name: Giffords
subject: Five reasons to contribute $5 to Giffords PAC today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We hope these five reasons will convince you to contribute to Giffords PAC before our year-end fundraising drive comes to a close
#

Friends -
In just two days, our year-end fundraising drive comes to a close, and [**we’re asking if you can contribute just $5 to Giffords PAC to help us reach our end of year goals.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221229-1-subs&t=1&akid=3089%2E3935704%2EVe6RlT)
Here are 5 reasons why your $5 contribution to Giffords PAC is so important:
1. Unfortunately, the United States has higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world. It doesn’t have to be this way, and we are working every day at Giffords to advance solutions to end gun violence once and for all. That work is fueled through the support of small-dollar donations to emails like these.

2. Over the summer, Congress passed the most significant gun safety legislation in decades. Our work was a crucial step in making this happen, but there’s still more to be done. We’re currently working to close a dangerous loophole that allows gun sales by unlicensed sellers without background checks, and we need your support to make this happen.

3. We’re coming up on the 10 year anniversary of Giffords. Over the past 10 years, we’ve been able to help pass 525 gun safety laws nationwide. With your help, we can pass hundreds more in the years to come.

4. Our new Congress is narrowly divided. We need to ensure we’re starting next year off with strong support so we can show our newly elected Congress that we’re not backing down in the fight for gun safety.

5. After our end of year fundraising deadline passes, we’ll be reporting **_every single**_ contribution we’ve received this year publicly. If you contribute today, YOU will be a part of ensuring we have a strong showing in this report.

We’ve given you five reasons as to why your contribution is so crucial. Now it’s up to you to take action.
[**Will you chip in $5 or any amount you can to Giffords PAC today? Do it before our end of year fundraising drive comes to an end on Saturday.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221229-1-subs&t=2&akid=3089%2E3935704%2EVe6RlT)
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/20617?c0=giffords-em-dec22.T9zczg&refcode=em221229-1-subs&t=3&akid=3089%2E3935704%2EVe6RlT)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cw1qcH&refcode=em221229-1-subs&t=4&akid=3089%2E3935704%2EVe6RlT)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-dec22.7SXY6R&refcode=em221229-1-subs&t=5&akid=3089%2E3935704%2EVe6RlT)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-dec22.EeXQyB&refcode=em221229-1-subs&t=6&akid=3089%2E3935704%2EVe6RlT)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-dec22.4PkA5L&refcode=em221229-1-subs&t=7&akid=3089%2E3935704%2EVe6RlT)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec22.xfoOYP&refcode=em221229-1-subs&t=8&akid=3089%2E3935704%2EVe6RlT)**
---
****
Thank you,
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=3089%2E3935704%2EVe6RlT) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Charles Booker
subject: We broke some real barriers and made historic progress together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

It has been just over a month since our historic campaign came to an end.
We might not have received the results we needed to win, but we broke some
real barriers and made historic progress that is critical for our future.

We brought together over half a million regular Kentuckians – from the
Hood to the Holler – to stand up and say that we have had enough. In half
of Kentucky counties, our campaign out-performed the democratic ticket
from 2020. And we did it with a small fraction of the financial support or
media attention.

We never received the big checks my opponent did. We didn’t have the
national support that other Senate candidates enjoyed. And we didn’t have
super PACs and dark money coalescing around our race. But despite all of
that, we had the support of hundreds of thousands of people like you who
decided to stand up and join our movement. For that, I am so grateful and
inspired.

But I’ll be straight with you, Peter. Because we left it all on
the field in the final days of the election, our campaign has some debt to
pay. A combination of unavoidable expenses and missed fundraising goals
have left us with a gap that we need to close in order to close out our
campaign and focus on building the next chapter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18858?t=1001&akid=2857%2E346206%2EPVg9qz ]I need your help. If you are able, please consider making a
contribution today.

CHIP IN →

Thank you again for everything you did and continue to do. I hope you are
enjoying a period of reflection and relaxation with your loved ones during
this holiday season.

I’ll be in touch soon.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20221229-2857-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2857_346206_PVg9qz&akid=2857%2E346206%2EPVg9qz

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2857%2E346206%2EPVg9qz

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: Where is God in all this?
body:

America is at a crossroads...

How did we go from our Founding Fathers pledging to each other their
lives, fortunes, and sacred honor... to being a bunch of triggered,
self-centered, pissed-off people who do little more than play the blame
game and then complain about it on social media?

And where is God in all of this?

body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be322d2a8032460b9a801d73e998a4c1&_e=RqXpt_g4G6U-GSFF13N4uvwBfmuCA0Wez_cFQn2h0NtlrrUurMq2ig9wBIoO0KG7MiiuI_fm_rXA7gLXNMix3Xw2BxMROOfzpznQvRMtUHAi3FVu9jN5h4aJbFoeYfjlNaPSwLbDoW8vnh0Swb5Om0VecbtTNwmJjCrc4-FCLSYRh5VQ0B7TKLNRyEOR-6BHoLVF3lKKd_PzfBip5j583vMve21HA24xWpQL27Ay0rX2ZQYVB40uu-kIfutZBX69tUkLvLdOacfGQT6qXnTqsAL8s3DVBVorU_ekgC8KjyFAPCgcpLtXX1zM5KhwVOYi) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be322d2a8032460b9a801d73e998a4c1&_e=RqXpt_g4G6U-GSFF13N4uvwBfmuCA0Wez_cFQn2h0NtlrrUurMq2ig9wBIoO0KG7MiiuI_fm_rXA7gLXNMix3Xw2BxMROOfzpznQvRMtUHAi3FVu9jN5h4aJbFoeYfjlNaPSwLbDoW8vnh0Swb5Om0VecbtTNwmJjCrc4-FCLSZjKDrICbDsiTX4aYmliRoi0K2Q066CQ-TErb-OxzdanFGGtNB_8IX7_JS8mzvppoqpnB2Yn2mq0nwKKqoP26TdbSFj4HaEQ2_fyoa1VthaNBva0pvZtk2tRC3dGhyLER6QiY2epNucDtUTNkt24Mqc)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be322d2a8032460b9a801d73e998a4c1&_e=RqXpt_g4G6U-GSFF13N4uvwBfmuCA0Wez_cFQn2h0NtlrrUurMq2ig9wBIoO0KG7MiiuI_fm_rXA7gLXNMix3Xw2BxMROOfzpznQvRMtUHAi3FVu9jN5h4aJbFoeYfjlNaPSwLbDoW8vnh0Swb5Om0VecbtTNwmJjCrc4-FCLSZAnK67rfoqMsQcHk8fEHeWihmpNqFZKBPYouCCOO2NYs4Y2o6V4I_bR4-CLa9iiWpiHuS4Dwu7q4d8o9D9ME23JtNjyjrTyvzAkZMlP2zH-UmW1-hpOwEj6nirXqS2H9dUO3M-oFT4up5-nw491cKi)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be322d2a8032460b9a801d73e998a4c1&_e=RqXpt_g4G6U-GSFF13N4uvwBfmuCA0Wez_cFQn2h0NtlrrUurMq2ig9wBIoO0KG7MiiuI_fm_rXA7gLXNMix3Xw2BxMROOfzpznQvRMtUHAi3FVu9jN5h4aJbFoeYfjlNaPSwLbDoW8vnh0Swb5Om0VecbtTNwmJjCrc4-FCLSbiKURte6SXRwEnNdW5LVOX-KBPnWJp4Si2dx0qV4cXog94zJiqYzOiaKM0MEyRYeLIpK_D_8_IMMFvdQU3dsEct7fxpOwT3cbp-UOsBUO7f6p3aSi4O8zhtkdMSyenwqf1jvnSASFPNZEwyNVdzLFs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be322d2a8032460b9a801d73e998a4c1&_e=RqXpt_g4G6U-GSFF13N4uvwBfmuCA0Wez_cFQn2h0NtlrrUurMq2ig9wBIoO0KG7MiiuI_fm_rXA7gLXNMix3Xw2BxMROOfzpznQvRMtUHAi3FVu9jN5h4aJbFoeYfjlNaPSwLbDoW8vnh0Swb5Om0VecbtTNwmJjCrc4-FCLSbqkttJVhDLs9yarZiY9YQHfdas6wVYODWCEgDa5koaJCb_Cnjlt_jwnZbtQ4nncCqIwVu_4yj0HxlMwQ_EQqNwEj5EeP016bkkzUqkt0-wIhSNgyRgpSJvuaybAv5L1bHxJop6ZMPjNe4aLUTDt3oy)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can't do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Free the January 6 Protestors! ** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit. Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

Hi team, There are three things you need to know right now:
1. Wes and Aruna have been hard at work on the transition, and will be sworn into office on January 18, 2023. Because of that, they haven’t had much time to fundraise.
2. Our campaign only has until January 17 to fundraise and rebuild our infrastructure; then, we have to freeze all fundraising activities until session ends in April.
3. Today, there are only two days left until the year ends, **giving us just two days to reach our $75,000 End-of-Year fundraising goal.**

**[This people-powered movement is made possible through grassroots contributions from folks like you. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Derek, what can I say to convince you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1519%2E5257348%2EBdfePg ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, is there anything I can say that will convince you to
make a year-end contribution to our campaign?

Forget our deadline for a moment. Consider the facts:

Republicans expected to gain upwards of 40 House seats this year in a “red
wave.”

They flopped. They won a bare majority, and even that, only because of a
skewed GOP gerrymander.

Democrats had our best Senate midterm during a Democratic presidency since
1934 — when Democrats picked up Senate seats in the first midterm of
President Roosevelt’s New Deal.

Yes — voters responded to competence, to normalcy, to Democrats’ ability
to pass big, bold, progressive legislation and strike bipartisan
compromise on infrastructure, on manufacturing, on marriage equality.

Especially after four-plus years of chaos with the former guy.

But we couldn’t have gotten the message out without your leadership and
support, Derek.

There’s no better time to start building the infrastructure to take back
the House — and defend the White House and Senate — than right now. Thanks
to your support we had an incredibly productive session of Congress, and
we will do so again, once the American people see the sharp contrast of an
utterly dysfunctional GOP.

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Congress Derek, is there anything I can say that will convince you to make a year-end contribution to our campaign? Forget our deadline for a moment. Consider the facts: Republicans expected to gain upwards of 40 House seats this year in a “red wave.” They flopped. They won a bare majority, and even that, only because of a skewed GOP gerrymander. Democrats had our best Senate midterm during a Democratic presidency since 1934 — when Democrats picked up Senate seats in the first midterm of President Roosevelt’s New Deal. Yes — voters responded to competence, to normalcy, to Democrats’ ability to pass big, bold, progressive legislation and strike bipartisan compromise on infrastructure, on manufacturing, on marriage equality. Especially after four-plus years of chaos with the former guy. But we couldn’t have gotten the message out without your leadership and support, Derek. There’s no better time to start building the infrastructure to take back the House — and defend the White House and Senate — than right now. Thanks to your support we had an incredibly productive session of Congress, and we will do so again, once the American people see the sharp contrast of an utterly dysfunctional GOP. [ ]So Derek, I’m humbly asking: Chip in $10 or whatever you can spare to help build the foundation of our 2024 campaign to take on Kevin McCarthy and Donald Trump, and take back the House majority. subject: Emergency EoY fundraising drive

body:
Open to see the donation we’re asking you to make today – and why it’s so important.
#
Derek -
$3. That is the donation we’re asking you to make to VoteVets before our emergency end-of-year fundraising drive comes to a close. Yes, $3.
$3 because we spent down much of our resources in the 2022 election — money well spent given our results.
$3 because we have to be ready for the tough legislative fights sure to come up in the new Congress.
$3 because the voices of Veterans and Military Families are just as important and effective in those fights as they are in campaigns.
So please.
What most people don’t know is that almost all of our donations come from people chipping in $3 at a time. Please chip in and we’re going to continue doing great work... together.
[**Use this link to contribute $3 directly to VoteVets before our year-end fundraising drive comes to a close in just a few days. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.pX32s6&refcode=em221229-1-15&t=1&akid=7249%2E3013755%2EQoqr7b)

name: Jill Biden
subject: We must head into the new year stronger than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We must head into the new year stronger than ever, and that will take this entire grassroots team stepping up right now. | |
---
As this year comes to a close, I want to say thank you for being a part of this grassroots team, Derek. You’ve supported our party, and you’ve kept the faith in an idea that together, we can build a better America. In November, we had a historic midterm election -- one that was only possible because of early investments from people like you. As we look forward towards the new year, we must bring the same dedication and drive, because Joe, Kamala, and Democrats across the country need you by their side. With the DNC’s final deadline of the year approaching quickly, I’m asking: **[Will you make a $7 donation to the DNC ahead of its end-of-year deadline on Saturday? clean_body: We must head into the new year stronger than ever, and that will take this entire grassroots team stepping up right now. | | As this year comes to a close, I want to say thank you for being a part of this grassroots team, Derek. You’ve supported our party, and you’ve kept the faith in an idea that together, we can build a better America. In November, we had a historic midterm election -- one that was only possible because of early investments from people like you. As we look forward towards the new year, we must bring the same dedication and drive, because Joe, Kamala, and Democrats across the country need you by their side. With the DNC’s final deadline of the year approaching quickly, I’m asking: With your support, we expanded our Senate majority and lost fewer seats in the House than in any Democratic president’s first midterm election in at least 40 years. I’m so proud of this team’s commitment, and I know that we’re just scratching the surface of what’s possible. The DNC is the only party organization focused on winning elections from the school board to the Senate nationwide, so I hope you'll join me in supporting Democrats ahead of their deadline this Saturday. Thank you, Jill Jill Biden Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: Kadida Kenner
subject: Expanding the electorate in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
We’ve achieved so much together, and we’re just getting started.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56584662/385431013/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221229EOY1_EOY_KK_90DO_5_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmYzUyYTg0LWI5ODctZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=16eA6cYp6CMtBsB8bpr10B0C19cIx6eU9XxfpQajd6c=)
| Fellow activist, We made a lot of progress in Pennsylvania this year, and we should celebrate all the successes.

The Commonwealth’s voters rejected candidates who ran on abortion bans, attacks on voting rights, hateful division, empty promises about crime and inflation, and fear-mongering about identity.

We are building a Pennsylvania that is for all of us, and for the first time in a long time, we have a State Legislature that is becoming more reflective of the people who call Pennsylvania home.

Our work is far from finished. Pennsylvania’s youth, immigrants, and Black, Indigenous, and other people of color remain woefully underrepresented after centuries of oppression and neglect.

**[Fellow activist, we must keep building our movement to expand the electorate. That’s why it’s so important we start off the new year right by hitting our $10,000 end-of-year goal. Will you donate $10 right now to help us double our staff and expand to Philly for even more progress in 2023 and name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Yikes. House vote now expected on Keystone XL, new drilling, and an end to the National Environmental Policy Act. Please read today.
body:
__Time sensitive |
---

| _Peter -- I'm following up because this is truly important. I hope we'll hear from you before the year is over:_ [](https://links.messages.lcv.)
We're still $15,000 away from our fundraising goal -- and we're anticipating that House Republicans _**will set up a vote on one of the worst anti-environment energy bills in recent history, as soon as they reconvene in the new year.**_ We're expecting major expansions in drilling, a green light for constructing Keystone XL, and _worse_. Not even a massive tar sands pipeline disaster from the existing Keystone can delay House Republicans doing the bidding of their oil and gas executive cronies -- _**we need your help to show how extreme and out of touch this move is.**_

[This is a moment that everyone in the environmental movement needs to be ready for. See the details below -- and donate today, before 2022 ends. Even $5 can really make a difference right now >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

\- Gene |

* * *

---

|
DEVELOPING... the new class of Congress is set to meet next week, and with the House set to be under Republican control, they're pushing quickly to make a dirty energy package their first bill out of the gate. [Please, make an urgent year-end contribution to help us block this bill. Even $5 is enough to help >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**Peter, -- this could be really, really bad.** We've just received word on what to expect and it includes:
* **Major** expansions offering up public lands for fossil fuel production.
* A green light on restarting construction of the **Keystone XL pipeline** (despite the _massive_ failure and oil disaster from the existing Keystone pipeline).
* A provision to tie the Biden Administration's hands from blocking drilling leases.****

The bill is also expected to completely gut the environmental review processes required by the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA). This is the law that requires environmental impact studies for projects like pipelines, highways, and drilling on public lands -- and gives affected communities the chance to give input on these projects.

The truth is -- blocking these kinds of bills comes down to grassroots pressure. Campaigning. Flooding House and Senate office with calls, letters, and emails. Meetings with House champions and Senate leaders. As we stare down a major year-end fundraising deadline -- we're asking for your help. **Can you make an urgent year-end contribution to LCV?******

[Help power our fight to protect climate action. We need to raise $25,000 to make our voice heard on Capitol Hill. Please make a gift today -- even $5 helps.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**I want you to know -- this is a fight we can win.** I know because I've seen what we can achieve when the environmental movement organizes is a major way. Here are just a few examples of what **you** helped achieve this year:
* ******After a decade of work, we passed historic climate legislation -- the Inflation Reduction Act -- into law.** This year, our nation made truly historic progress to protect people and the planet. In August, Congress passed and President Biden signed into law the Inflation Reduction Act, which contains roughly _$370 billion_ in transformative investments for clean energy, energy security, and environmental justice.
* **You turned out to vote, expanding environmental leadership in the Senate and creating a "green wave" in the states.** Voter support for candidates who back strong climate action was in abundant evidence this year, as against long odds, political headwinds, and historical trends, voters turned out and delivered a clear victory for climate and democracy in the 2022 elections.
* **We expanded protections for public lands with the historic designation of Camp Hale -Continental Divide National Monument.** After years of campaigning and pressure from the movement, President Biden designated Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument in Colorado, the first national monument his administration has declared -- AND we expect President Biden to soon designate Avi Kwa Ame, or Spirit Mountain, as a National Monument in Nevada.

We need to keep this kind of work going -- not just to block extremist Republican attempts to ramp up drilling, but to EXPAND clean energy, and to PROTECT clean air, clean water, and our communities and climate.

But that'll only happen when we hear from people like you -- people who know how high the stakes are for the planet. We can't afford to wait.

[Please -- before the year ends, make your contribution. If everyone reading this email made a gift as small as $5, we'd blow through our $25,000 goal in minutes.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thanks for everything that you do. We'll be in touch soon with more opportunities to make a difference.

Onward,

Adam, Caitlyn, Alex, Annie, Krysten, Norita
LCV Membership Team |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9043090&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDQ3MDgyNgS2&spReportId=MTY0MDQ3MDgyNgS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9043090&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDQ3MDgyNgS2&spReportId=MTY0MDQ3MDgyNgS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_) |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Highlights of 2022 – end of year update from Mississippi’s free market think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132720?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**The Mississippi Center for Public Policy had a great year advancing the cause of low taxes, limited government and liberty!**

Thanks to your support and encouragement, we achieved:
* **Legislative wins** \- including a new law to combat Critical Race theory.
* **Tax cuts** – with a significant cut in the state income tax.
* **New research** – including the Mississippi Fat Cat report and our publication Drain the Swamp.
* **Packed public events** with Lord Daniel Hannan and Fox News contributor, Douglas Murray, speaking in Jackson.
* **A national award** from the State Policy Network.
* **The Mississippi Leadership Academy** , which helps counter the ‘woke’ infiltration of the education system by introducing young Mississippians to ideas about free markets, limited government and the American Founding.

None of this would have been possible without your encouragement and support – so thank you!

**Having moved with my family to Mississippi from the UK, I am 100 percent invested in this state. Your support means so much to me personally.**

You can read more about the highlights of our year here:
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d365b70d70&e=5703353baa)
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=753952b0cb&e=5703353baa)
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=fe9ca87d53&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=6f1d53b376) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=6f1d53b376).

subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:

No Mass or Sunday worship ser They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70dd85e6981c45efb90aa1d06a5f3fce&_e=drviSC7kko8Rg04YBI8DlEFV8I0ovs7UpWra9Ul2HE_fyGkuJEkeWMopD43IY42OoAR-aDcOaL-he_nL_VbXo2dJHVZdioW1gKHpuRu_TQctaCQUwGGBlnmKIuJcJWTVftSokhyMqnA1f9U9o4BqMNRlaj8YinhZfbv7O7ueC1LXNI59XKjW2DOiZ5qn99yGZTdewGbA0OBg0chlDx-K3hby99xGBeMgTb3DMrJa21aVjIoX6RAzpvcJPDjQqlhkWcF_5vlYpIusa1xMVgPZZRcKQhhknQSzP6ESL_NtG8SSf2cQqLTfkcAFpyCbIsxl)

---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70dd85e6981c45efb90aa1d06a5f3fce&_e=drviSC7kko8Rg04YBI8DlEFV8I0ovs7UpWra9Ul2HE_fyGkuJEkeWMopD43IY42OoAR-aDcOaL-he_nL_VbXo2dJHVZdioW1gKHpuRu_TQctaCQUwGGBlnmKIuJcJWTVftSokhyMqnA1f9U9o4BqMNRlaj8YinhZfbv7O7ueC1JHXdma7mWLCBKa-WfuCeFE98kvfHXSy5gaze6VRdM76NYNxK7zry1yJk7FvpTG6x2r2l4zG4AZtcbgJLsPmKgRnmjpai7E48G-o17mWQg4jph4-qXrqVAdrNV3F5djzIj-rV15vpLK7B3ZMR7sL4Kk) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70dd85e6981c45efb90aa1d06a5f3fce&_e=drviSC7kko8Rg04YBI8DlEFV8I0ovs7UpWra9Ul2HE_fyGkuJEkeWMopD43IY42OoAR-aDcOaL-he_nL_VbXo2dJHVZdioW1gKHpuRu_TQctaCQUwGGBlnmKIuJcJWTVftSokhyMqnA1f9U9o4BqMNRlaj8YinhZfbv7O7ueC1Lg7PEKt45du3xJvk_J6g0wokNxVuOP_Nf0QDQKGPRp_ACe9X-Us0Q1LQC-VWBa0HFkT7n0R2t3-4YAjUlkV8kY1vvU8QQ6fzSN4rflHh7ttvFHumovZxV_al9fz0XJt_xcPTbpdY-bE_r5JYZj1TkP)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):
* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70dd85e6981c45efb90aa1d06a5f3fce&_e=drviSC7kko8Rg04YBI8DlEFV8I0ovs7UpWra9Ul2HE_fyGkuJEkeWMopD43IY42OoAR-aDcOaL-he_nL_VbXo2dJHVZdioW1gKHpuRu_TQctaCQUwGGBlnmKIuJcJWTVftSokhyMqnA1f9U9o4BqMNRlaj8YinhZfbv7O7ueC1I08_GQ0-zcw4HbPbG-Wis8UeCHERf5inVvUYYEAxgZIlMgUIrv3xQCzAkSq004yw4NyXVtkk6orlz8gjFHcOGJNmNULen2W-aSLYdUd-OwQ7xC0t460rXqCu4GEEB29_yVwW_tkY-JoIBmvDldobaQ)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70dd85e6981c45efb90aa1d06a5f3fce&_e=drviSC7kko8Rg04YBI8DlEFV8I0ovs7UpWra9Ul2HE_fyGkuJEkeWMopD43IY42OoAR-aDcOaL-he_nL_VbXo2dJHVZdioW1gKHpuRu_TQctaCQUwGGBlnmKIuJcJWTVftSokhyMqnA1f9U9o4BqMNRlaj8YinhZfbv7O7ueC1JraKuASPsAFO6oY4Sno-srlTkzcvooIxubA1yQ8PG87CiqWH_8BXQXykUdIxda7FAzH_E9nSEIugCjlGEkieIEjDr9b34JYPZNm1MJHEmHFeV6bkmobcJ5M7KYlWPcCHosI-KfGheu_U2zTVpQtnOW)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

clean_body: They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship ser They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | | | | | | Hi Patriot, I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election. Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots. Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union. Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit): Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy No Mass or Sunday worship service Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time Outrageously, there’s more. Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA. They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment! This can’t go on. I won’t allow it. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can’t do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Free the January 6 Protestors!** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit. Peter Willis,

Thanks to our targeted organizing and 4.5
million conversations with voters, John Fetterman and Raphael Warnock won
tough Senate races that gave Democrats control of Senate Committees and
the subpoena power that comes with it.

That means that our founder Bernie Sanders, in his new role as Chairman of
the Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions (HELP) Committee, will be able
to compel corporations to answer for their exploitation of working people.

He’s already promised to use his new power to hammer Big Pharma for
charging dangerously high prices for prescription drugs, fight to raise
the minimum wage, expand access to early childhood education and push for
policies that most wealthy countries take for granted, like Medicare for
All and tuition-free college.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8179?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221229_1_4&t=1012&akid=3850%2E5885482%2EdldHQV ]Corporate-aligned politicians on both sides of the aisle will do
everything they can to stop Bernie because they know the public is on his
side on all of these issues. Can we count on you to rush a donation before

and push for progressive change?

We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! ---
**To:_Dr. Anthony Fauci_**
**Signature:_Not Received_**

Team, Dr. Anthony Fauci has announced his plans to retire after over **_50 YEARS_** of public service!

Dr. Fauci has devoted his entire career to serving our country. He's guided us through MULTIPLE public health crises, including the COVID-19 pandemic -- but despite his decades of service, **Republicans have continued to attack and smear his reputation!**

That’s why we're organizing a MASSIVE thank you card to stand with Dr. Fauci and let him know how grateful we are for his decades of service. But we need 20 more Democrats from Pennsylvania to sign on if we're going to hit our 50,000 signature goal! **Please, before the midnight deadline:**

[**Click here to sign the card and thank Dr. Fauci for his _decades_ of public service! >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11409?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221229-AddYourName-FauciRetirement-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221229-AddYourName-FauciRetirement-Pros-sl1&akid=9271%2E9716520%2E1ahV-C)
| [SIGN THE CARD](https://go.dscc.org/go/11409?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221229-AddYourName-FauciRetirement-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221229-AddYourName-FauciRetirement-Pros-sl1&akid=9271%2E9716520%2E1ahV-C)

name: The Good Fight
subject: Election Integrity Takes a Hit
body:
| | | | The fight rages on for Kari Lake
---
[](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7StW4dPXCLCvWTzcEI-2BfM1MSht-2BYoNAH66gEdjsDvXmrMVHl_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6SR5tkzENCrV5l91q8h-2F-2BPues1HedMqV29R-2FADxVAroj5hBueJDaDUxWx2049zcxi8dZ02ZJk1D0wIcrKtPVL-2BP8r8cWNdUlG1tvEjMCZyGWWmqQPA3MvHXf44TZU-2BhlaOYDFzi6nHvtXMYLQ0e524EzzbhO7Po2n2kV2ApEWulJkMu5pa6LZqTUlkHOwRxCmd-2F4PHM1DF1Dx8ocuFHCr91catBVdzFuF6eSZeXhY8blfNjKhle-2BuRwmwPoBoOxZrd-2B6FB8DbARYq19Q6EX-2FGAEMtvv-2BUPFUs2FnjuqggTEpL8rtRiIqRXpTansBnuHvt5r2RmC4lRrsZHNYTyx-2F-2BXv2yxQ4Y8R2916fRIQ5AUSBtQg5UgSRr69-2BKXiSD0b2oIXonxw5DTWxpeCbaIMjFPkQcHMY5fD6C6e0h-2B29LVzTnts8iYZSKZl-2FwQFCajGch-2FOHoz8wDOM5nBY7A40sERrJftJLjwCl9OeIyZhOxMiloUOXHbmj-2Bo7L6hCx3mI9wSjZff3UZ1D-2BwL3yvs7A31QmGEEKxuTgM4VdM68zl0iVr8-2FJEzpvzKw0XVAb6IqpNqSfbsPx-2B6CLTd8SBdPfyz9FXZ7Dvn4FA8bsugfEadIOoY64q3wl2TcDaSa3AIQr0XRJYujKaqEfCVkeXzBbh0qX-2BWkNxuHqy1dwuKYqR6miHQ5CSNbk9Y7SYn-2B7dFvFRKFsw7TYJRPlhBaBtVYsxMPt5K4WiZi6iyFr2QGC94RgCBCPukRb8HWSHcCGwIbKwfLB3OdAqOrN3bIqZflbxk92Lxd1lJT17iuU0Iu6CqpLgw-2F3xfvFO5M1AuWu3U-2FebcqQfJC0P0OG3Y4083x6J4A390w3end4W3SsniS-2FabT8-3D)
---
---
Hi Friend,

Do you have concerns about election integrity? In Arizona, Kari Lake has been fighting hard but experienced a setback. Can there be grounds for an appeal in her lawsuit over the 2022 election?
Also, China's zero covid policy is a dud as millions of new cases are exploding across the nation despite harsh methods by the CCP.
All these topics and more in this episode of The Good Fight.

clean_body: 🚨 🚨 🚨 🚨 🚨 🚨 | Patriot, We have an urgent update from Team Lake. An Arizona judge has ruled against Kari's election lawsuit, but this trial was never the end all be all of this fight. This was always just the beginning. We will APPEAL, and we will bring this lawsuit all the way to the steps of the Supreme Court if need be. Kari's finalizing our plans with the most formidable team of election lawyers this country has ever seen. This judge may not have ruled in our favor, but we have faith in the American justice system. It's not too late to make things right. | Best, Team Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: Then we’re closing our books on 2022. | Friend, In less than a week, the 118th Congress will convene for the first time in what marks the beginning of America’s comeback story. For our new House majority to put our country back on the path to greatness and hold Joe Biden accountable, I need grassroots patriots like YOU to continue fighting by my side. But as it stands, we’re $9,150 short of our year-end goal with Saturday’s deadline quickly approaching. That’s why generous Texas conservatives have offered to 1,000% match ALL grassroots contributions made by Saturday to ensure we crush our goal. Only in America could the great-great grandson of a slave graduate West Point, serve our country, and now call himself Congressman-elect. The American Dream is a beautiful thing. We live in the greatest country in the world and she’s worth fighting for, Friend. That’s why our new majority’s mission is plain and simple: FIGHT FOR YOU each and every day. But I’m also counting on your support to help me crush our year-end goal so that we can hit the ground running the minute our new majority convenes on January 3rd. **Peter -- this is a longer email but I hope you’ll read the whole thing.**

The four years with Trump as president were decidedly dark and seemingly hopeless.

But then, the American people stood up, rallied, and organized to put a good Democrat in the White House and secure Democratic majorities in both the House and the Senate.

Since then, I’ve been awestruck by how much we’ve been able to accomplish and move the needle on so many key progressive priorities -- COVID-19 aid, LGBTQ equality, environmental protections and so much more.

**But Peter, we can kiss this all goodbye if Democrats get complacent.**

Our successes are only meaningful if we can keep our progressive priorities in this new Congress. _And that fight has already begun._

But what scares me the most is that our fundraising has come to a severe halt.

In fact, we've barely raised anything since this morning! But I know we can do this. We still need to raise $3,083 to reach our $15,000 End-of-Year goal. And there's just a few hours left. [**So, Peter, I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 (or more if you can), to help us catch up with the GOP and protect our House majority. Let’s show them what we’re made of. clean_body: Let’s show them what we’re made of. | = Peter -- this is a longer email but I hope you’ll read the whole thing. The four years with Trump as president were decidedly dark and seemingly hopeless. But then, the American people stood up, rallied, and organized to put a good Democrat in the White House and secure Democratic majorities in both the House and the Senate. Since then, I’ve been awestruck by how much we’ve been able to accomplish and move the needle on so many key progressive priorities -- COVID-19 aid, LGBTQ equality, environmental protections and so much more. But Peter, we can kiss this all goodbye if Democrats get complacent. Our successes are only meaningful if we can keep our progressive priorities in this new Congress. And that fight has already begun. But what scares me the most is that our fundraising has come to a severe halt. In fact, we've barely raised anything since this morning! But I know we can do this. We still need to raise $3,083 to reach our $15,000 End-of-Year goal. And there's just a few hours left. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = In gratitude, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. name: Doug Moore
subject: 50 years
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56587412/385441087/967549813?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxNzRiZTUxLWM1ODctZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGeQd7SQANcFqeHuznuce0PXeMfuwXg9wHxcm5gxHUY=&emci=7356ccf2-c187-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&emdi=b174be51-c587-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=2107230) Dear Peter, Oregon League of Conservation Voters turned 50 this year! That’s a half-century of protecting Oregon’s natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected officials accountable. Will you make a year-end gift of $50 or any amount to support our work protecting Oregon’s people, places, climate, and environment? **[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56587413/385441088/967549813?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxNzRiZTUxLWM1ODctZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGeQd7SQANcFqeHuznuce0PXeMfuwXg9wHxcm5gxHUY=&emci=7356ccf2-c187-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&emdi=b174be51-c587-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=2107230)** As we celebrate this milestone, we’ve been taking a trip down memory lane. Here’s a look back at 50 years of OLCV and what we’ve accomplished together. **1970s**
OLCV was founded in 1972 by a coalition of 501c3 organizations (mainly the Oregon Environmental Council and the Sierra Club) who wanted to create an environmental PAC. The first **Environmental Scorecard for the Oregon Legislature** was published in 1975. **1980s**
The organization changed its name from the Oregon League of Environmental Voters to Oregon League of Conservation Voters and hired its first Executive Director. **1990s**
The 90s were an eventful decade for OLCV! In 1996, OLCV took over sponsorship of the **Oregon Conservation Network** , transforming it over time from a loose network of groups defending against rollbacks and threats to Oregon’s environment into a powerful coalition with many major legislative victories. The first **county chapters, in Washington and Lane counties** , were established in 1997. In 1998, OLCV held the first **Annual Celebration for the Environment**. And from 1999 to 2002, **county chapters were established in Clackamas, Marion, Lincoln, Multnomah, Jackson, and Deschutes counties**. **2000s**
We had some big legislative wins in the 2000s–Oregon established the nation’s most aggressive **renewable energy standard** in 2007 and in 2009 Oregon became the first state to pass a **Clean Fuels** bill into law. **2010s**
Oregon’s **Clean Fuels Program** became permanent in 2015. In 2016, we passed **Coal to Clean** , which will transition Oregon from coal power to clean, renewable energy by 2030 and double the state’s **Renewable Portfolio Standard** to 50% by 2040. OLCV played a key role in saving the **Elliott State Forest** in 2017. In 2018, OLCV PAC made what was up to that point its largest investment ever in an election, over $1 million dollars, and its largest investment in a race, $750,000 to re-elect Governor Kate Brown. **Today**
In 2020, Governor Brown signed a **landmark executive order on climate** , requiring large polluters to lower pollution 45% below 1990 levels by 2035, and at least 80% below 1990 levels by 2050. In 2021, the legislature passed **HB 2021** , putting Oregon on track to 100% clean energy by 2040. And just this year, OLCV PAC made its **largest ever investment in an election cycle** –$1.8 million–and its **largest ever investment in a single race** , helping elect climate champion Tina Kotek to be our next governor. I’m so grateful to you for being part of our community. Your dedication and generosity helped us achieve all of this – and the reason I know the next 50 years will be even more successful. **[You can help by making a special year-end gift to OLCV today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56587414/385441089/967549813?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxNzRiZTUxLWM1ODctZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGeQd7SQANcFqeHuznuce0PXeMfuwXg9wHxcm5gxHUY=&emci=7356ccf2-c187-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&emdi=b174be51-c587-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=2107230)** Thank you again for all you do. Here’s to another 50 years! Sincerely,
Doug Moore
OLCV Executive Director |
---|---

name: Kevin Schilling, Team Kilmer
subject: Did you catch Derek's last email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
We can't afford to fall behind on our final fundraising goal of 2022, Peter.
Peter - I wanted to make sure you didn't miss Derek's email from yesterday.

As we look ahead to the new year and the GOP taking back the House, it's crucial we end 2022 strong. We can't afford to miss our final $10,000 fundraising goal for this year, which is why I want to make sure you saw Derek's last message.

**[Will you take a few moments to read Derek's note? Then help us hit the ground running in 2023 by chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Thank you!

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Derek Kilmer (info@derekkilmer.com)
Date: Wed, Dec 28, 2022
Subject: The House majority was decided by only 6,670 votes
Team,

Looking back on 2022, I'm grateful for everyone who chipped in, volunteered, put out a yard sign, voted, or even talked to their friends and family about what's at stake in the midterms. Because of your hard work, I'm honored to be fighting on behalf of our region again in the House.

We've seen the GOP's legislative agenda, and it's clear we have some big fights ahead of us. I sat down with my finance team this week to take stock of things heading into the new year.

I'm ready to hit the ground running in 2023 to defend our rights in Congress. That's why we've set a goal to raise $10,000 before the end-of-year deadline to help us prepare for the challenges ahead, no matter where the road takes us.

**[I'm counting on having a strong grassroots team by my side every step of the way next year, and the time to invest in this fight is right now. Can I count on you to chip in toward our $10,000 end-of-year goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**$10**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10)
---
| [**$25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=25)
---
| [**$50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=50)
---
| [**$100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=100)
---
| [**$250**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=250)
---
| [**Other**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---
Look, the House majority was decided by only 6,670 votes across the country, team. It's clear the American people are tired of partisan games, and I plan to go to bat for our values in Congress no matter what road blocks are put in our path.

It's now more _crucial_ than ever before that we build a strong grassroots movement. Our work to build a government that is of, by, and for _the people_ is far from over. The work starts right now.

**[Before the end-of-year deadline, will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help me start the new year strong? Every little bit helps us reach our goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

As always, it's an honor to serve you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/coup85pEHnS0uI7lKqlsDouzi_LoqTO3AmPrxIT41GI=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/3tZrSE0gFQL3Yria1tyJOx-zWKyNUmJodKG2Xnrro8E=)
---|---
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/e61IsoVX9nPOIajSu5YRxLIQPmXrIUNJhbUkaD1GzKc=?refcode=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221229_EOY2_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email)
Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a0cOn2eTHGfefNhsrtzlut50vVm_Tn5KGkSWimaEKA=/pODxRzjGC5uCPyItTgskoUkYOsmmBf175bdgoMscEqw=).

name: Bennet HQ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
We know you may be relaxing and enjoying the holidays, but this is important. Please give us a moment to explain why. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56587762/385442388/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg1YjhmYy1jNzg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=INApf5m-HLMzn6zf3cEKI6a_Am3hA3M3VrIyc2ZuvK0=)
Hi there — We’re writing to humbly request one last contribution before this year ends. Please give us a moment to explain why this is so important right now. **It may seem a bit early to talk about 2024, but your help now empowers us to support fellow Democrats over the next two years — and hit the ground running for them right after the New Year.** With a Senate map that favors Republicans and Donald Trump running for president, we need to make early investments to defend our majority (and democracy) in 2024. Right now, we have less than three days left before our very last fundraising deadline of 2022. After Saturday, we have to disclose our “cash on hand” and other financial figures to the Federal Election Commission, and everyone will be able to pick apart our data and try to find any weakness. **We want to show Trump, the National GOP, and our allies that Team Bennet stands ready to fight and win in 2024.** That’s why we’re reaching out to ask: [**Please chip in any amount before our final fundraising deadline of the year on Saturday. Your donation will help us start fighting to keep Colorado blue, hold the Senate, and keep the White House in 2024 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56587763/385442389/-1599547651?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_EOQ_GEN_AC_20221229_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg1YjhmYy1jNzg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=INApf5m-HLMzn6zf3cEKI6a_Am3hA3M3VrIyc2ZuvK0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ********[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56587764/385442390/-1599547651?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_EOQ_GEN_AC_20221229_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg1YjhmYy1jNzg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=INApf5m-HLMzn6zf3cEKI6a_Am3hA3M3VrIyc2ZuvK0=)********

clean_body: We know you may be relaxing and enjoying the holidays, but this is important. Please give us a moment to explain why. | = Hi there — We’re writing to humbly request one last contribution before this year ends. Please give us a moment to explain why this is so important right now. It may seem a bit early to talk about 2024, but your help now empowers us to support fellow Democrats over the next two years — and hit the ground running for them right after the New Year. With a Senate map that favors Republicans and Donald Trump running for president, we need to make early investments to defend our majority (and democracy) in 2024. Right now, we have less than three days left before our very last fundraising deadline of 2022. After Saturday, we have to disclose our “cash on hand” and other financial figures to the Federal Election Commission, and everyone will be able to pick apart our data and try to find any weakness. We want to show Trump, the National GOP, and our allies that Team Bennet stands ready to fight and win in 2024. That’s why we’re reaching out to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | ****=**** | ******=**** | | ****=**** | ******=**** | | ****=**** | ******=**** As always, thank you for being part of this team. — Bennet HQ Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Kari Lake
subject: Let me be the first to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
|

---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point — that’s just not an option.**

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona’s November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I’m not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you — I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know — do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!** ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJyNksFu3CAQhp_GvmHZg8HswYe2m_RQKVIOPfS0IjBeUxlwMI7lPH3A2STHVkJI8838ww8D9g3vgFJG21Ope8nlgLo0PdQADcCp6WjNoALOmRQcleCqaWAo2hqtNFMlm02G4L2tlLfl2IMWtBOCtScpWi14xxSrO0UF0KdTW7Ny6scY56Wg3wq4T2tBtQasNuMC6twkM_mCRAbz6p0kw-o0MU4lfjMliNmki6ijf8LBhCVGH3Gadr8Sv8-5sqD3ITcOxl0Leo5hxQK4vfg5GvcF1mgvFrVZbWIBX5ZRhg---DUoTPy95cEihlx5yQZv_rK95I7IV6LaW5mSdpbmmg_6t-UPjU9pF_9LctySbCFJpfXru4ql6OImo1PQPu53DB_F7_GAo9Hpwc98rpf6LG0Zej1vZprMwrs0yesxyTy_5Hsyw94X3fcC4JABHKOC5z-bDetf--snkXc1eeYPluUk_Eh73Gf8rLw1qY4Pkml3fgOaQseT)

body:

| Peter,

Did you take our survey yet? We want to hear what's important to you. Before our end-of-the-year deadline arrives, we want to make sure every voice is heard as we prepare for the year ahead.
* * *

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Before midnight on December 31
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John announced our goal, and we have to come to you to ask:
#
Hey Derek, our end-of-quarter deadline is coming up -- and it's the last fundraising deadline of 2022.
John already announced our goal: **Having 15,000 grassroots donors chip in any amount by 11:59 PM on December 31.**
So we have to ask:
**[Can you step up to the plate and be one of the donors that we need from 18326? We need as many people to help us reach our 15,000 contributions goal by midnight on December 31.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49621?refcode=em20221229-8187&t=1&akid=8187%2E434096%2EezegpF)**
**[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49629?refcode=em20221229-8187&t=20&akid=8187%2E434096%2EezegpF)**
Derek, we're in this together. Folks all over the Commonwealth chipped in what they could to elect John in November — and now we're bringing our fight for working families to the U.S. Senate.
And since John doesn't take a single cent from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry, the only way we'll reach our 15,000 donor goal by December 31 is with your help.
**[If just a few more people from 18326 chip in, we'll be able to reach our goal and finish 2022 strong. Will you make a contribution today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49621?refcode=em20221229-8187&t=21&akid=8187%2E434096%2EezegpF)**
Thank you!
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221229-8187-footer&t=22&refcode2=8187_434096_ezegpF&akid=8187%2E434096%2EezegpF)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=8187%2E434096%2EezegpF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=8187%2E434096%2EezegpF)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Consolidation in the airline industry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Thousands of Americans are stranded in airports this holiday season, and countless others are paying jacked-up prices to get home.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15594%2E3422442%2ETFH7t9)
Derek,
Thousands of Americans are stranded in airports this holiday season, and countless others are paying jacked-up prices to get home.
**[Congress should hold airlines accountable by passing my bill to require prompt refunds for canceled or significantly-changed flights.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-airline-petition/?source=EMAE29_PET_20221229_V1_F&t=2&akid=15594%2E3422442%2ETFH7t9)**
To get to the root of the problem, we also need to address consolidation in the airline industry. **When corporations don't have to compete for consumers, it's easier to hike prices and deliver bad service.** This is an issue across industries—from airlines to grocers to ticket vending.
As a mom, I know how stressful the holidays can be. My heart goes out to everyone who was harmed by this meltdown. As a consumer protection attorney, I know there are steps we can take to hold the airlines accountable. Congress must take action. **[Sign my petition to show your support for holding airlines accountable.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-airline-petition/?source=EMAE29_PET_20221229_V1_F&t=3&akid=15594%2E3422442%2ETFH7t9)**
**[Sign my petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-airline-petition/?source=EMAE29_PET_20221229_V1_F&t=4&akid=15594%2E3422442%2ETFH7t9)**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE29_PET_20221229_V1_F&t=5&akid=15594%2E3422442%2ETFH7t9)**
–Katie Porter

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=6&akid=15594%2E3422442%2ETFH7t9)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=15594%2E3422442%2ETFH7t9).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

Peter,

While pundits and naysayers gleefully predicted a “red wave”, Democrats Serve worked to elect public service Democrats across the country who know first-hand the real-life impact of the policies they’re backing, and who know from experience what it takes to get things done.

**And our strategy worked.**

From first responders and social workers to educators and congressional staffers – __more than 40 of our endorsed candidates won in 2022__ by bringing an invaluable and often underrepresented perspective to politics and policy.

The first fundraising totals of the new year will be reported soon after the Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline on December 31st. **It’s critical that we prove supporting candidates in public service is a popular strategy for Democrats.**

[That’s why we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $10,000 from grassroots contributions. Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Democrats Serve
55 Beach Shore Drive
Milford, CT 06460
United States

And our strategy worked. From first responders and social workers to educators and congressional staffers – more than 40 of our endorsed candidates won in 2022 by bringing an invaluable and often underrepresented perspective to politics and policy. The first fundraising totals of the new year will be reported soon after the Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline on December 31st. | | Friend, **Have a 2A Task Force New Year! ** The holiday season focuses on the things that truly matter - God, family, and our country. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. The 2A Task Force is led by one of the country’s most respected voices on the Second Amendment, Donald Trump Jr. He recognized an opportunity to better organize pro-second amendment efforts and already succeeded once by sinking Biden’s radical anti-gun lobbyist nomination to lead the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, **but now we need your HELP!**
