clean_body: We're committed to reaching the voters we need to decide the next election, and we need your help. Peter, this may feel painful to read: John Fetterman stuck to a key principle: Every county and every vote matters. And he was right. He flipped red counties, won support of unlikely voters, and built a coalition that flipped a seat Republicans held for decades. Now, we're preparing to reach every voter we need to keep Bob fighting alongside John for better, more affordable health care, a stronger economy that works for everyone, and a world where every child, worker, student, senior, and family has the resources they need to thrive. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = What we raise right now will determine what we can achieve in 2023 and 2024 — where we can open offices, who we can recruit, and how fast we can grow. Your support now will show that you're invested in a statewide, grassroots campaign that fights for people. And you'll show Republican challengers that you won't let corporate special interests buy this race. = Thank you, Team Casey Help Bob Casey defend the Democratic Senate majority. Chip in. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Democrats push for FIRST semi-automatic gun ban in 20 years [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-8-1-1-1-1]
SIGN YOUR NAME: Demand Congress BAN Assault Weapons → [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-8-1-1-1-1]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-8-1-1-1-1]
President Biden just sounded the alarm:
https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-8-1-1-1-1 [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-8-1-1-1-1]He is absolutely right!
For the first time in history, guns are the leading cause of death for kids.
And election workers are wearing bulletproof vests to protect themselves from election conspiracists.
Our nation is in the midst of a gun violence crisis. Every day, more than 110 Americans die from gun violence. We don’t have to be numb to this. We don’t have to live like this. We don’t have to die like this. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-8-1-1-1-1]
But without enough public support, Congress may not take this critical action on gun safety. So we’re gathering 15,000 Democrats to pressure Congress to Ban Assault Weapons. The petition closes at midnight. Please sign the petition immediately: [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-8-1-1-1-1]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-8-1-1-1-1]

Team DASS

Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!

Patriot,

We have an urgent update from Team Lake.

An Arizona judge has ruled against Kari's election lawsuit, but this trial was never the end all be all of this fight. This was always just the beginning.

**We will APPEAL, and we will bring this lawsuit all the way to the steps of the Supreme Court if need be.**

Kari's finalizing our plans with the most formidable team of election lawyers this country has ever seen. [**BUT we 're going to need your help, Friend, if we're going to be able to finish this fight.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4911ed07c5e54b6bb0e1e775463128c1&_e=T2v9H-HgA5vbPjGgpCyfJtGVyDqUraB44bACBRjdAVTSztnDJMJO6vtCV5rn8tGeHrKqQK4RzGIYubzdb1N92fLINV4cUcsIYMhywkFGSWxy7TRwVsDPPKsHC0BKltcQvzYzcqlVvYkZ8DScxpb-Of_PJnq15k8AvlWzDQYlo-TW8soSF26rzKdsUf8_E5IAErlxX11Qz5xXZN4RJ0CX0KVX78nvHjT5-Uqcwikou34uV1695LYENeesLQUkG6UfhANM1Yt11NWbeuv_8EExg9uquh6R3haPGTXUk1wdKOQCh1Rg1C4LIqivuzHwQ6muIvwkgAk1GNOXH8gASIGyhvKnRVMDRo6lcceMsprlvp-bVRo3YxX2T1bzG3j7H8mF9oPKmSQFugKL4auUYySN7I8qL229fQIllX9AaOrUy6jymBsmBU4Daky0idErDuoBDj5KC_hGPhm9YS9gmegtR5MOc6PL2g08Yt3bJMuO2-4OC3S4dmXwlWkMZ2_4TdhE6LVWZY6FodJYVhcGPI5jN6EyoZ6eJMyaeOjzqNSsRGc%3D)

This judge may not have ruled in our favor, but we have faith in the American justice system. It's not too late to make things right.

[**According to our team, if every one of our supporters can contribute just $10 to Kari Lake 's fight to secure our elections and ensure the disaster that happened in Arizona is NOT repeated, our team will have the funds needed to bring this case to the Supreme Court.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4911ed07c5e54b6bb0e1e775463128c1&_e=T2v9H-HgA5vbPjGgpCyfJtGVyDqUraB44bACBRjdAVTSztnDJMJO6vtCV5rn8tGeHrKqQK4RzGIYubzdb1N92fLINV4cUcsIYMhywkFGSWxy7TRwVsDPPKsHC0BKltcQvzYzcqlVvYkZ8DScxpb-Of_PJnq15k8AvlWzDQYlo-TW8soSF26rzKdsUf8_E5IAErlxX11Qz5xXZN4RJ0CX0KVX78nvHjT5-Uqcwikou34uV1695LYENeesLQUkG6UfhANM1Yt11NWbeuv_8EExg9uquh6R3haPGTXUk1wdKOQCh1Rg1C4LIqivuzHwQ6muIvwkgAk1GNOXH8gASIGyhvKnRVMDRo6lcceMsprlvp91L55lwKw9n5DI51urLMbHXp1OaIRaWddodPy2T0totgMSqGmF4LvJWXHLwUhNZAXt0-utOvE7pM45XYruu_o6_FDi6tmtgV5w2-nwSEJRWWWXvRJa6bgqc8Gsd7xiarBhwKgU3Mc_yvAz1TeEOeSQ45XUHggC9l5OLD1HHN70LcCz3HJxzKch07hnH9U8EMI%3D)

Folks, we're writing with a quick reminder: Out of the 33 Senate seats up for re-election in 2024, 23 are currently held by Democrats. That includes Martin's seat in New Mexico. We're building up the resources necessary to defend twice the amount of Senate seats as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans — so we can't let a moment go to waste. Your support is an important part of our work. We rely on grassroots donations to power our voter outreach, ads, and more. The issue is that our final end-of-quarter deadline of the year is in _2 days_ — and we're falling behind on our daily fundraising goals. If we're going to get back on track, we need folks like you to chip in $10 or more before midnight. **So, can you rush in a contribution right now to help us catch up? name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:

clean_body: The work to fight for Delaware never stops. = = In just 2 more days, everyone will be closing the books on 2022. But for us, team, closing the books also means filing our fundraising totals one last time. = = We won’t lie to you, folks: 2023 is going to bring us some serious challenges. Republicans have already promised to put our progress on the chopping block the moment they gavel into the majority. Everything we have worked for is at stake, and while we have the Senate and the Presidency to stop their agenda, there is plenty of damage they can do on their own in the House. Thankfully, we have Lisa ready to lead the charge against the GOP’s extremism, but she can’t do it alone. Each and every one of you has been integral in sending Lisa back to Congress, and we need your help to ensure she can continue that fight for years to come. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **= | | = | = | | = | = | | = One last push, Nick Fulchino Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers. = Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . **

subject: Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams teamed up
body:
You won’t believe who teamed up in the fight against GOP-led voter suppression... | | |
---
| | You won’t believe who teamed up in the fight against GOP-led voter suppression: **Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams!** They’re doubling their power to _urge_ – together – that every single person who cares about our right to vote should join this fight. In their very FIRST public joint venture, Michelle Obama warned that Republicans are attacking our “freedom to vote, cast our ballots and have our votes counted” – and Stacey Abrams explained how these laws would unfairly impact “Black, Brown, young, and working-class voters, and voters with disabilities.” **Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams are drawing attention to this problem. Now, it’s our turn to do something about it.** **[_Take action today: Will you rush a $7 donation to elect state Democrats who will FIGHT for voting rights and help us reach our critical end-of-year fundraising goal? All gifts will be matched SEVEN TIMES through December 31st >>_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHMSJZFSk1FLUwSwQGsvWPhniGuB14vL9xXdlhsqUsXszvF3inS925UdcNNsA_BO3eOy_DYZK2YSA2uKwhN8hdhOYr8e9b8_7hkb90ab-zGS4whACW04sCP5ed7HwOEseBpQ-iFupziCJJjelZGBKY8TGoUhMm4bM_iL5xuIO_kraz2xtIDL70T9GBHqs1vwAxyQ-RWJKlDY_i1FgoCxbornrDGANQBKQuyYSKq6pS5vAUzxdLL3I1pB4qao6rc3D9S4XAuc09kxMS9YClT-EDdmNYHf30qdzl6-W-xZrGELGxWJa4Y3eFmpqWA_hyqJuM6BkXJ5gDbgrgk1lp1hjl61WcDMJVCMdTzomvtsBpSLyKWnx_VfuR6Wxsrsv8CNEdmNF1t22depflPXnWBY0oNQ/3se/ugZtLePlSVuNeNcBK5S72w/h0/ZQaSkZg9d5H1Wds00oj8UZGXizlb6nlk9_989GE9I4U) ** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHMSJZFSk1FLUwSwQGsvWPhniGuB14vL9xXdlhsqUsXszvF3inS925UdcNNsA_BO3eOy_DYZK2YSA2uKwhN8hdhOYr8e9b8_7hkb90ab-zGS4whACW04sCP5ed7HwOEseBpQ-iFupziCJJjelZGBKY8XKyTGnXHU1jcu6Qn7tCQXcoX1uT-f6MQCi5pAHMISshUfnezyFySFGijMgEp-0-cwGCn7QphxI0SMO-DVJzjPHBqmqhh1QoOWu1jNy4KgTDeu6flyUXmnISAy0xfzjf-RpDf3maMr2bKLuOkvKuZAp3LdT6q05Svcw2h39F10Wgi093U1PcVF0sgA3qz8uDM0OhZ2UbboWD9nGDW6zgog8XfR6SY05bRU97KIjVdj8AyR0V7Z3aY5TvV1Z0I5Ni4A/3se/ugZtLePlSVuNeNcBK5S72w/h1/YSnY0fkxH85fMq39GmA9H0jiCg9RGn9g7mw_5kNelAU) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: You won’t believe who teamed up in the fight against GOP-led voter suppression... | | | | | You won’t believe who teamed up in the fight against GOP-led voter suppression: Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams! They’re doubling their power to urge – together – that every single person who cares about our right to vote should join this fight. In their very FIRST public joint venture, Michelle Obama warned that Republicans are attacking our “freedom to vote, cast our ballots and have our votes counted” – and Stacey Abrams explained how these laws would unfairly impact “Black, Brown, young, and working-class voters, and voters with disabilities.” Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams are drawing attention to this problem. Now, it’s our turn to do something about it. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Republicans in state legislatures don’t seem to care about the destruction they’re creating – they don’t seem to care about giving Americans access to the ballot box or even protecting the fundamental freedoms of our democracy. But we care. Democrats like Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams – along with millions of voters, activists, and grassroots supporters – are taking on the GOP and its voter suppression efforts. Thanks, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. | Team,

Now that the recount is over, it's official: **_Kris Mayes will be the next Attorney General of Arizona!_**

This means that for the first time since the late 1970s, Democrats have won control of the Governor, Secretary of State and Attorney General offices!

Kari has said she is going to APPEAL and will bring this lawsuit all the way to the steps of the Supreme Court if she needs to. Kari is fighting hard for free and fair elections, and your support is critical to helping her WIN and make change across our nation. She is the only one fighting for us; we need to help her. | Thank you for being on the right side of history, Grace Team Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We need to go all in
body:
#
Peter,
It’s Pramila Jayapal here, Chair of our Progressive Caucus and proud Justice Democrat. In the past few years, I have seen our movement grow exponentially.**Justice Democrats has been there every step of the way.**
With every cycle, JD has been instrumental in recruiting and electing progressive champions who have fought by my side in Congress so we can transform the Democratic Party.
I do not take our work lightly, and neither does Justice Democrats. They are committed to building our progressive bloc for the long term, which is why I’m asking you to join me and support them before the year ends.
[**JD is raising for their $75,000 end-of-year goal, and with only a few days before the clock runs out, your donation now is critical. Can you contribute $3 today?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123914?refcode=em20221229-26798&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=26798%2E1203867%2EwsdPr3)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123914?refcode=em20221229-26798&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=26798%2E1203867%2EwsdPr3)**
Our work is too important to slow down now. The Green New Deal. Medicare for All. Free college, student debt cancellation, universal childcare, a federal living wage, and more — that’s what we’re fighting for. If we want to make our government work for working people, we need to go all in, and that’s what Justice Democrats is preparing to do in 2024.
**Just like my campaign, Justice Democrats is a grassroots organization powered by the people.** They reject all corporate PAC donations and special interests, so donations from supporters like you will make all the difference in the new year.
[**Peter, can you dig deep and contribute $3 or more today? With just a few days left in the year, your donation will get Justice Democrats that much closer to reaching their $75,000 goal.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123914?refcode=em20221229-26798&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=26798%2E1203867%2EwsdPr3)
Thank you for everything.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=26798%2E1203867%2EwsdPr3) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=26798%2E1203867%2EwsdPr3) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221229-26798-footer&t=24&refcode2=26798_1203867_wsdPr3&akid=26798%2E1203867%2EwsdPr3)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=26798%2E1203867%2EwsdPr3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=26798%2E1203867%2EwsdPr3)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert’s race was ignored by all the pundits, by most Democrats with power and money and, in the end, 541 more votes would have led to one of the biggest upsets in the past generation in a congressional race. Well, we have good news! Her challenger, Adam Frisch, knows he can win, and is talking about running again.
body:
Frisch could win next time
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59c3e59b-a850-40ea-a800-8086c7259309/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Blue Amp Action was one of the first--if not the first--groups to tell you Lauren Boebert was vulnerable to a spirited challenge by Aspen City Councilman Adam Frisch in early 2022, sharing that her Trump-leaning district is:_** a) Not as Trump-y as those of most of the other flying monkeys she's associated with (Gaetz, MTG, Gohmert, Jordan, etc); b) she was unpopular in the district because of her never-ending-look-at-me antics, scandals & abject cruelty; c) Unlike most of her fellow loons, she's in a state controlled by Democrats who wouldn't bend congressional-district-lines to accommodate her difficulties d) Adam Frisch was a good candidate, and as a moderate Democrat, a good fit for the district. **Yet, the race was ignored by all the pundits, by most Democrats with power and money and, in the end, 541 more votes would have led to one of the biggest upsets in the past generation in a congressional race.** **_Well, we have good news! Frisch knows he can win, and is talking about running again._** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10 or $25 to Adam Frisch before the December 31st deadline? To send a message to Frisch and to Boebert that this rematch needs to be on, and this time, Frisch will be the last one standing._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T099c1d79-b74a-4198-8050-d94a5664269c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83d45d01-bfba-4560-9536-1e1363cad4dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Add in Boebert's most recent scandal, that her attacks against international hero, President Volodymir Zelensky of Ukraine, during his visit and congressional speech were used as propaganda on Putin-mouthpiece RT, and Frish is leaning towards another run._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10 or $25 to Adam Frisch before the December 31st deadline? To send a message to Frisch and to Boebert that this rematch needs to be on, and this time, Frisch will be the last one standing._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ff92917-9fb6-495a-af70-39b99128283a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for fighting for our democracy seat by seat.
Cliff

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te4fe0bc4-7fc8-488b-97e0-7022aef33fb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: John McGuire Endorsement List
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Running for VA State Senate
---
| | | |
|
---
| Team,
Just nine days away, our campaign kickoff is January 7, 2023 11am to 2pm at Sportspage Bar and Grill, 36 Broad Street Rd Manakin Sabot, VA 23103. We will have some amazing conservative speakers including E.W.Jackson, Sandy Rios, and Senator Amanda Chase. RSVP to brittonross9@gmail.com
Excitement is building for our State Senate Campaign. We are humbled to already have solid conservative support, including broad support across all ten counties in Senate District 10. Endorsements include pastors, farmers, legislators, law enforcement, supervisors, business owners, school board members, veterans, and more. Why should you vote for John McGuire? John is a Father, Husband, Navy SEAL, and a 24-year business owner with a solid, proven conservative voting record in the General Assembly.
We will have a convention in May to determine the Republican nominee for State Senate. The most important thing right now is collecting delegate commitments. Please use this form: [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dud5Wjd8Zudx3mQmCrDC9YV8BHKvkv09ymqopDC28QdpeDlbr5sFHt1yeiNw8ZSUSj8jWV90vLxjrmg6tw-XwL_y8a5kGdhI5PM6TfSC6VAe7runNClayweLI5qOX7fF8eemLyFyqaRlnfAmNSPIk815G_BsYZZBlMG2h6Ea4yMA9DFXF8QpQYOtas_nQO3rfywO7uOQ2MciO7BEPszoK2v0bh2WwJMG1CZuOb7-91g94IWs2_jU_CEDVa7RmZrG&c=WX0dsLVeP3UsImYUv6EQHeO3Phhbl-_m8CaQ88cY8Nrk0N552tiaUg==&ch=KBnJThCODVjYkH7G58516yWFIQeHhPa37KrVLLDQ6V3enEUs5TatbA==) to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the VA State Senate District 10 Convention.
Of course we need to raise funds as well. You can contribute online here [https://mcguireforvirginia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dud5Wjd8Zudx3mQmCrDC9YV8BHKvkv09ymqopDC28QdpeDlbr5sFHr2uFNQ-WcYb96zLR4rXf5nJ5m_eZPIGUTlKvRQ9eVQo0p-Rgz2861Lg_t3yfCZCdmQlNdAFINplD893Gat8e6QBGFHpIf9E-VrgzaCakrg2&c=WX0dsLVeP3UsImYUv6EQHeO3Phhbl-_m8CaQ88cY8Nrk0N552tiaUg==&ch=KBnJThCODVjYkH7G58516yWFIQeHhPa37KrVLLDQ6V3enEUs5TatbA==)

clean_body: Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Running for VA State Senate | | | | | | Team, Just nine days away, our campaign kickoff is January 7, 2023 11am to 2pm at Sportspage Bar and Grill, 36 Broad Street Rd Manakin Sabot, VA 23103. We will have some amazing conservative speakers including E.W.Jackson, Sandy Rios, and Senator Amanda Chase. RSVP to brittonross9@gmail.com Excitement is building for our State Senate Campaign. We are humbled to already have solid conservative support, including broad support across all ten counties in Senate District 10. Endorsements include pastors, farmers, legislators, law enforcement, supervisors, business owners, school board members, veterans, and more. Why should you vote for John McGuire? John is a Father, Husband, Navy SEAL, and a 24-year business owner with a solid, proven conservative voting record in the General Assembly. We will have a convention in May to determine the Republican nominee for State Senate. The most important thing right now is collecting delegate commitments. **Team, did you see what President Obama said about our fight for fair maps?** | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56583605/385425873/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=20221228.2a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyY2Q0ZjY0LWIzODctZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7BQRzbW3wmqCMucX-J3ZQmXla8BwSZbHWjv270wTNOI=)**
---
_President Obama is absolutely right._

Back in 2018, our affiliate supported the creation of Michigan’s independent redistricting commission. That commission approved what _The New York Times_ called “one of the fairest” maps in the country in 2021 – and, in 2022, Democrats took full control of Michigan state government _for the first time in 40 years!_

**Now, Republicans are _panicking_.** They know if we pass fair redistricting reforms in more states, _their days of unearned power are limited_. That’s why the GOP is scrambling to make it harder to pass the kind of ballot initiatives that secured fair maps in Michigan – and it’s up to us to stop them.

As President Obama said, **“Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.”**
[**_It’s grassroots supporters like you who give the NDRC the energy and drive that has made our movement so successful, team. Will you pitch in now to help us keep going strong?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56583606/385425874/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=20221228.2a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyY2Q0ZjY0LWIzODctZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7BQRzbW3wmqCMucX-J3ZQmXla8BwSZbHWjv270wTNOI=)

clean_body: | Team, did you see what President Obama said about our fight for fair maps? | = President Obama is absolutely right. Back in 2018, our affiliate supported the creation of Michigan’s independent redistricting commission. That commission approved what The New York Times called “one of the fairest” maps in the country in 2021 – and, in 2022, Democrats took full control of Michigan state government for the first time in 40 years! Now, Republicans are panicking. They know if we pass fair redistricting reforms in more states, their days of unearned power are limited. That’s why the GOP is scrambling to make it harder to pass the kind of ballot initiatives that secured fair maps in Michigan – and it’s up to us to stop them. As President Obama said, “Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
Thanks to you, Democrats beat the odds and expanded the Senate majority.
| | |
---
Folks – it’s been a long year.

When we started this campaign, we knew it would be an uphill battle. But thanks to you, Democrats beat the odds and _expanded_ the Senate majority. Granite Staters – and Americans across the country – sent a clear message that we won’t tolerate attacks on our fundamental rights or the foundations of our democracy.

| | Hi friend, Hope you are having a great holiday season! Although it’s coming to an end, we still have one last gift to give you: A front row seat to New Jersey history. You’ll be able to tune in LIVE on January 3rd as Tom Kean, Jr. is sworn in as New Jersey’s newest member of Congress! Be sure to save this link so you can be there with us on the big day: [**https://live.house.gov**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=c1d71170a52041d588d166b9a0c1dbde&_e=svoGx-W2CHvfoAd-CEr2HDxmt-Ocu4bswfLK4Ac8PP0AJdp4rzIIL5UfTW36IZxDqe8EwXK6fuhOvK_RNm534nObkX4ftwQBfd0pRU5bjaw1WFX5BZZrMLjaSalYyylm6P3gO5ueSryTMFHbDgBzznthTaPhW90Pk3QNqxMXVS0APz6WbtZ5akR2bcBdRtBK1JaCU_XaXLcUqCcAGNk3fA%3D%3D) Until then, Tom’s DC team is working around the clock getting ready to hit the ground running as soon as the office opens its doors. If you have any questions or need assistance, you can reach the team at [**info@tomkean.com**](mailto:info@tomkean.com). Hope you’ll join us,Team Kean

clean_body: Be part of this historic day with Tom! | | | | | Hi friend, Hope you are having a great holiday season! Although it’s coming to an end, we still have one last gift to give you: A front row seat to New Jersey history. You’ll be able to tune in LIVE on January 3rd as Tom Kean, Jr. is sworn in as New Jersey’s newest member of Congress! Be sure to save this link so you can be there with us on the big day: Until then, Tom’s DC team is working around the clock getting ready to hit the ground running as soon as the office opens its doors. If you have any questions or need assistance, you can reach the team at mailto:info@tomkean.com. Hope you’ll join us,Team Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2022 Kean for Congress

Election year is around the corner, so Andy and his team have been working hard to put themselves in a good position to start 2023 strong. That's why they set a goal to raise $25,000 before the ball drops on New Year's Eve, but as of this morning, it looks like we are a little short of our goal.

[**So, I have to ask, will you pitch in to Andy’s re-election campaign before this final end-of-year fundraising deadline to help us reach our $25,000 goal? name: =?utf-8?Q?Semi=20Bird?=
subject: 2023 is in reach
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6bba90bdce&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,Whenever a new year rolls around, we all have that feeling of new hope, don’t we? We face the world with a fresh start and a new opportunity to tackle big goals. My name is Semi Bird, and I too write to you today with those same feelings, except that my goals include running for Governor and trying to be a part of big, CONSERVATIVE changes in this country.
Let me tell you a little bit about myself. Growing up, I never had any idea I could ever run for office. We came from humble beginnings and running for Governor was nothing I ever could have imagined in my future. I grew up in the ghetto of East Oakland, California with a single mom and six siblings.While my mother’s budget might have been small, her Christian faith was large and she taught me that I was always to be held accountable for my actions. The 'victim mentality' was not allowed. Mother believed firmly in taking control of one's own destiny so that we could become strong, independent and positive-contributing members of society.**THE MILITARY CHANGED MY LIFE!** I struggled academically and dropped out of high school after completing my junior year and I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps. I knew that if I wasn’t furthering my education, I needed to be making something out of myself. My mother wouldn’t have stood for anything else! I eventually enlisted in the U.S. Army and I am proud to have served my country during my career.
In addition to eventually earning my Bachelors and Masters Degrees, I served in Army Special Forces Intelligence and Operations. I am also honored to have received:
* A Bronze Star Valor
* A Purple Heart
* A Meritorious Service Medal
* Four Army Commendation Medals
* Four Army Achievement Medals
* And several others

I mention those awards not to brag on myself, but so that you understand more about my mother and the work ethic she instilled in me. She taught me to be a fighter.**IT’S NOW TIME FOR US TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE RADICAL LEFT!!**
| [HELP SEMI FIGHT BACK AS GOVERNOR OF WASHINGTON!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a52c1d8cff&e=fdefed58de)
---
There was a time that life lessons like my mother taught me were more commonplace. Mothers and fathers instilled those values in their children. Unfortunately, our country is being run by people with a very different set of ethics from you and me.
Our current President has launched an all-out attack on freedom-loving Americans and Governors of various liberal-run states are no better. Right here in my home state of Washington, our Governor, Jay Inslee, allowed Black Lives Matter protestors to take over six blocks in downtown Seattle.
I am ready to fight against that LEFTIST JUNK and get back to the values taught by my mother and the military. I want to become Governor of Washington and change all the liberal policies that have changed this great state for the worse.**WILL YOU CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP ME GET THERE?**
| [DONATE $15 TO THIS RACE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b4146f0e00&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $30 TO THIS RACE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1bfca84542&e=fdefed58de)
---
We can change things in this country together, but I am going to need your help. Will you join me in this fight to save our great country? Much as my mother taught me to fight for what is right and to not be a victim, we must fight for the future of our nation. Joe Biden and leftist governors like Jay Inslee are destroying America.**BUT YOU AND I HAVE NOT LOST FAITH!** I know that good folks like you are willing to defend American values, rights and freedoms. We will not let the liberal elites ruin this great country. If every person reading this letter would chip in just $5 today, we would have the funds needed to fight this battle. What do you say? Are you with me?
| [LET’S TAKE BACK OUR NATION!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5be75d5341&e=fdefed58de)
---
In God We Trust,Semi Bird

clean_body: | | | Peter,Whenever a new year rolls around, we all have that feeling of new hope, don’t we? We face the world with a fresh start and a new opportunity to tackle big goals. My name is Semi Bird, and I too write to you today with those same feelings, except that my goals include running for Governor and trying to be a part of big, CONSERVATIVE changes in this country. Let me tell you a little bit about myself. Growing up, I never had any idea I could ever run for office. We came from humble beginnings and running for Governor was nothing I ever could have imagined in my future. I grew up in the ghetto of East Oakland, California with a single mom and six siblings.While my mother’s budget might have been small, her Christian faith was large and she taught me that I was always to be held accountable for my actions. The 'victim mentality' was not allowed. Mother believed firmly in taking control of one's own destiny so that we could become strong, independent and positive-contributing members of society.THE MILITARY CHANGED MY LIFE! I struggled academically and dropped out of high school after completing my junior year and I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps. I knew that if I wasn’t furthering my education, I needed to be making something out of myself. My mother wouldn’t have stood for anything else! I eventually enlisted in the U.S. Army and I am proud to have served my country during my career. In addition to eventually earning my Bachelors and Masters Degrees, I served in Army Special Forces Intelligence and Operations. I am also honored to have received: A Bronze Star Valor A Purple Heart A Meritorious Service Medal Four Army Commendation Medals Four Army Achievement Medals And several others I mention those awards not to brag on myself, but so that you understand more about my mother and the work ethic she instilled in me. She taught me to be a fighter.IT’S NOW TIME FOR US TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE RADICAL LEFT!! | There was a time that life lessons like my mother taught me were more commonplace. Mothers and fathers instilled those values in their children. Unfortunately, our country is being run by people with a very different set of ethics from you and me. Our current President has launched an all-out attack on freedom-loving Americans and Governors of various liberal-run states are no better. Right here in my home state of Washington, our Governor, Jay Inslee, allowed Black Lives Matter protestors to take over six blocks in downtown Seattle. I am ready to fight against that LEFTIST JUNK and get back to the values taught by my mother and the military. I want to become Governor of Washington and change all the liberal policies that have changed this great state for the worse.WILL YOU CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP ME GET THERE? | | We can change things in this country together, but I am going to need your help. Will you join me in this fight to save our great country? Much as my mother taught me to fight for what is right and to not be a victim, we must fight for the future of our nation. Joe Biden and leftist governors like Jay Inslee are destroying America.BUT YOU AND I HAVE NOT LOST FAITH! I know that good folks like you are willing to defend American values, rights and freedoms. We will not let the liberal elites ruin this great country. If every person reading this letter would chip in just $5 today, we would have the funds needed to fight this battle. What do you say? Are you with me? | In God We Trust,Semi Bird | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

subject: Thank you (& Happy Retirement!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
sending to Dr. Fauci at 9:00 AM tomorrow >>
| **BREAKING: Dr. Anthony Fauci to step down in just 2 days!** We’re so thankful for Dr. Fauci’s work and dedication to public service over the last _fifty years._

He led the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Disease, faced COVID head-on, and pioneered _decades of research._ We’re sad to see him go, but so grateful for everything he’s done for us.

[**That’s why we’re sending Dr. Fauci a massive Thank You letter with 40,000 signatures at 9AM tomorrow! Sign now to THANK Dr. Anthony Fauci for his work and wish him a happy retirement! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37799?t=6&akid=5939%2E878179%2EoJC5Ff) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37799?t=7&akid=5939%2E878179%2EoJC5Ff) | [Donate $5 to sign the letter now! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37799?t=8&akid=5939%2E878179%2EoJC5Ff)
---
TO: Dr. Anthony Fauci
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you (& Happy Retirement!)

Dear Dr. Fauci,

**Thank you.** Your commitment to science, public health, and our country over the last fifty years has made an incredible impact.

When Republicans spread lies and misinformation about COVID-19, you stood firm and helped lead our nation through it all with compassion and integrity.

_You’ve gone above and beyond in your work, and you will be dearly missed._

[**I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $5 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and make sure we elect good Democrats who will uphold your legacy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37799?t=9&akid=5939%2E878179%2EoJC5Ff) | [Donate $5 to sign the letter now! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37799?t=10&akid=5939%2E878179%2EoJC5Ff)
---
**X A GRATEFUL DEMOCRAT**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5939%2E878179%2EoJC5Ff). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5939%2E878179%2EoJC5Ff).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5939%2E878179%2EoJC5Ff) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=5939%2E878179%2EoJC5Ff). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5939%2E878179%2EoJC5Ff)
---

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: February 23, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Do you remember the day you joined this movement to elect Alexandria and transform our politics? We do...
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221229-3749-header&t=1&akid=3749%2E2526796%2ECb95Yz)
**February 23, 2021**
That's the day you first took action to elect Alexandria and joined our movement.
**December 31, 2022**
That’s the day that we must close our books and report our fundraising totals to the Federal Election Commission. This is an incredibly important deadline for us because it shows the right-wing that support for Alexandria is strong, not just in NY-14 — but in Your City and across the country.
**December 29, 2022**
Today’s date and what’s hopefully the day you make your first donation to support the movement we’re building together — a movement that’s about holding corporations accountable, getting special interests out of politics, and passing transformative policies for working families.
**Donations from emails like this is what keeps our campaign running and allows Alexandria to focus on policy and organizing — not on fundraising.**
[We’re still short of reaching our 8,000 person contribution goal. Can you make your first donation today before our end-of-year deadline? Any amount makes a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221229-3749-P_FND_EOQ_LGP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3749%2E2526796%2ECb95Yz)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221229-3749-P_FND_EOQ_LGP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3749%2E2526796%2ECb95Yz)**
If you can’t make a donation today, we understand! If you’re in a place to pitch in, we hope you will.
Thank you for everything,
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-202212?refcode=em20221229-3749-P_FND_EOQ_LGP&t=22&refcode2=3749_2526796_Cb95Yz&akid=3749%2E2526796%2ECb95Yz)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221229-3749-P_FND_EOQ_LGP&t=23&akid=3749%2E2526796%2ECb95Yz)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=3749%2E2526796%2ECb95Yz) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=3749%2E2526796%2ECb95Yz) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=3749%2E2526796%2ECb95Yz)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=3749%2E2526796%2ECb95Yz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=3749%2E2526796%2ECb95Yz)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56586537/385439257/-1334107482?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTBkOTcyNy1jNDg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rf45cjeQYPNvLvrjaY-GCt0lMY20C8ko1Fz4WlAWHMs=)

Hi there, I’m Alex with Team Landsman!

As Finance Director, it’s my job to keep an eye on our fundraising and make sure we’re in a good spot before the year ends. We are wrapping up our books for the year, and I just wanted to reach out quickly before we finish up!

[**_If you’re able, can you take a moment to chip in $7 to support Greg before we close the books on this year?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56586539/385439260/1723879753?amount=7&refcode=GLFC_20221229_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTBkOTcyNy1jNDg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rf45cjeQYPNvLvrjaY-GCt0lMY20C8ko1Fz4WlAWHMs=) | [RUSH $7 TO SUPPORT GREG LANDSMAN »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56586540/385439261/1723879753?amount=7&refcode=GLFC_20221229_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTBkOTcyNy1jNDg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rf45cjeQYPNvLvrjaY-GCt0lMY20C8ko1Fz4WlAWHMs=)
---
Look, Greg has big plans to deliver for Ohio’s 1st district in Congress.

He’s committed to working across the aisle to get things done for the people of this district — _because it’s long past time OH‐01 has leadership it can count on._

**But here’s the truth: we can’t do it without your help.**

[**_So please, can Greg and I count on you to chip in $7 before the end of the year? clean_body: It’s long past time OH-01 has leadership it can count on. | = Hi there, I’m Alex with Team Landsman! As Finance Director, it’s my job to keep an eye on our fundraising and make sure we’re in a good spot before the year ends. We are wrapping up our books for the year, and I just wanted to reach out quickly before we finish up! = | = Look, Greg has big plans to deliver for Ohio’s 1st district in Congress. He’s committed to working across the aisle to get things done for the people of this district — because it’s long past time OH‐01 has leadership it can count on. #### In this episode of The Latino Vote, the guys are joined by Stephania Taladrid of the New Yorker to discuss the importance of her latinx heritage and perspective to her journalistic career and also dive into the latest happenings since mid terms.

name: Peter Welch
subject: I’m so proud of the work we did this year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
None of these accomplishments would have been possible without your support. Let’s all take a moment to celebrate them.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB)
What a year it’s been.
Together, we were able to accomplish _so much_ , and for that, I’m deeply grateful.
2022 was one of the most productive years since I was elected in passing progressive legislation and tackling some of the most consequential issues facing our country. At the top of the list is the Inflation Reduction Act, which included measures I fought for to lower prescription drug prices as well as the single largest investment to address the climate crisis in history.
But that’s not all. A few other milestones include passing gun violence prevention legislation in the Safer Communities Act and protecting same-sex and interracial marriage with the Respect for Marriage Act. Finally, I’m proud we passed the PACT Act expanding health care for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits. I worked for years with passionate Vermonters who never gave up on that bill, and because of their tireless work we were finally successful.
And of course, I’m thankful for the support of this grassroots movement that powered our campaign for the U.S. Senate to victory. Because of our movement built on empowering people and organizing on issues that impact everyday life, I’ll be able to have an even greater impact in the Senate. **We all know the work ahead won’t be easy, but with supporters like you behind me, I know we can continue to make a real difference.**
As we look to the future and the work that lies ahead, the road gets tougher from here. That’s why I’m asking: [**If you’re able, can you pitch in a grassroots donation before our end-of-year FEC deadline?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5312?t=3&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5313?t=15&amount=3&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5313?t=17&amount=15&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5313?t=19&amount=28&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5313?t=21&amount=50&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5313?t=11&amount=100&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5313?t=13&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB)
---

---
I’m so proud of the work we did together this year. Thank you for making it all possible.
Here’s to more progress in 2023!
Peter
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5312?t=7&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB)

---
| [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22dec?refcode=em_20221229_f_p_eoy2&refcode2=1229_61531_mUmrWB&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB)
---
---

---|---|---
PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe here](https://act.welchforvermont.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1229%2E61531%2EmUmrWB).

I’m so grateful for all the support that’s been pouring in so far – before, during, and after the Midterms.

_Without dedicated grassroots supporters like you, my campaign wouldn’t be where it is today._

But, I have to admit I’m worried. We’re far behind our critical end-of-year fundraising goal: $8,803 short to be exact.

When my numbers go public after tomorrow, Republicans might see that our fundraising is no match for their 2024 political war chest of dark money if we fall short of our goal...and they could pounce.

[So please, folks: Will you chip in anything you can to help my campaign? Without dedicated grassroots supporters like you, my campaign wouldn’t be where it is today. But, I have to admit I’m worried. We’re far behind our critical end-of-year fundraising goal: $8,803 short to be exact. When my numbers go public after tomorrow, Republicans might see that our fundraising is no match for their 2024 political war chest of dark money if we fall short of our goal...and they could pounce. | | | | | | If Republicans sense any kind of weakness from this campaign, everything we’ve accomplished will go up in smoke. We already know the Republican machine will not rest. So folks, we absolutely cannot come up short now. We can’t let Republicans win. | | | | | | Hoping I can count on you, Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. Hello human friend of Jennifer's!

We are SO HAPPY Jennifer got re-elected this year (even if it means we don't get any extra time now for back scratches and belly rubs from her). We've had such a great time the last few weeks celebrating with her!

Jennifer is looking forward to getting right back out there after the new year and keeping up her incredible work for her fellow humans — protecting their rights, fighting for their dignity, and working to expand opportunity.

But some (very right-wing) humans are angry at Jennifer. They don't like that she took on big drug companies. They don't like that she's fought to keep the politics of that big orange man out of Northern Virginia. They want to give her a RUFF re-election campaign, and they're going to move fast in the new year!

We want to help Jennifer! But as dogs, we can only bark and run around and roll on the floor. Unfortunately, that can only reach a few voters!

[**So we need you to help Jennifer by chipping in a few dollars. We overheard her say that she's $7,198 away from her goal. clean_body: = Hello human friend of Jennifer's! We are SO HAPPY Jennifer got re-elected this year (even if it means we don't get any extra time now for back scratches and belly rubs from her). We've had such a great time the last few weeks celebrating with her! Jennifer is looking forward to getting right back out there after the new year and keeping up her incredible work for her fellow humans — protecting their rights, fighting for their dignity, and working to expand opportunity. But some (very right-wing) humans are angry at Jennifer. They don't like that she took on big drug companies. They don't like that she's fought to keep the politics of that big orange man out of Northern Virginia. They want to give her a RUFF re-election campaign, and they're going to move fast in the new year! We want to help Jennifer! But as dogs, we can only bark and run around and roll on the floor. Unfortunately, that can only reach a few voters! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Woof woof woof!!! = — Wanda & Lady Bear Wexton Rep. name: Peter, trying to reach you (via moms in office)
subject: Can't afford to end 2022 like this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
We’re getting closer to our final FEC deadline on 12/31/22 and here’s the thing: our ability to continue and achieve our goals next year depends on the donations we receive in these final few days of the year.
Peter, can we ask for a few minutes of your time to tell you why this work is so important and why we need you on our side?
This is a longer email, but we hope that you read it — [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice] and pitch in $5 to help us reach our $10,000 fundraising goal before the end of the year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]
Campaigning for an elected position is a full time, unpaid job. As such, many qualified women with caregiving responsibilities don’t run for office.
They can't afford to give up their jobs and take care of their families, all while running a campaign. The numbers simply don’t add up for them, the risk is too great. We need to lessen the risk and level the playing field.
Here is where we come in.
Moms In Office is changing that with a future-minded focus. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]
Each campaign cycle we endorse pro-choice moms running for office to level the playing field and elevate the power of all moms.
Our work is too important to slow down right now. Paid leave, universal childcare, the child tax credit, and more — that’s what we’re fighting for. If we want to make our government work for working families, we need to elect leaders who know firsthand what families are up against each day. This is what we are preparing to do next year and in 2024.
Can we count on you to chip in today to help us keep up the momentum and reach our $10,000 end-of-year goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]
https://vimeo.com/568995749 [https://vimeo.com/568995749]
Non of this transformational work would be possible without you.
Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]
https://www.facebook.com/momsinoffice [https://www.facebook.com/momsinoffice] https://twitter.com/momsinoffice [https://twitter.com/momsinoffice] https://instagram.com/momsinoffice [https://instagram.com/momsinoffice]

Moms in Office
13351 Riverside Drive
#265
Sherman Oaks, CA 91423
United States

name: Masha A., DLCC.org
subject: Can’t afford to end 2022 like this
body:
We need you in this fight. | | |
---
| | Hi, it’s Masha – the Senior Director of Direct Response here at the DLCC. I’m reaching out to you personally because we’re only a few short days away from 2023 and we are still $24,803 away from hitting our critical end-of-year goal. This cycle we flipped four chambers, created four new Democratic trifectas, and defended key majorities. And, while I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished so far, there are still _so_ many important battles to win in the future. **We only have 72 hours to hit our FINAL goal of the year – and if we fall short, we won’t have the resources we need to start 2023 off right.** Failing to hit this goal would have major consequences on our ability to support our candidates and in-state partners. But, if everyone reading this email chips in $7 (worth 7X more!), we can make it across the finish line and enter 2023 feeling confident about where we stand. At the start of the new year, we have the opportunity to flip a seat in an ultra-competitive special election in Virginia. So, we can’t afford to turn away our focus now.
And, electing more state Democrats in 2023 is vital to protecting abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, and ensuring our process of elections is not upended by right-wing extremists. That’s why we are reaching out – we still have more work to do in order to drive progress at the state level.
Contributing today will have the biggest impact on state Democrats' ability to be competitive in 2023, 2024, and beyond. Early investments allow us to ensure we have all of the resources to work with in-state partners, reach every voter, and conduct vital polling.

clean_body: We need you in this fight. | | | | | Hi, it’s Masha – the Senior Director of Direct Response here at the DLCC. I’m reaching out to you personally because we’re only a few short days away from 2023 and we are still $24,803 away from hitting our critical end-of-year goal. This cycle we flipped four chambers, created four new Democratic trifectas, and defended key majorities. And, while I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished so far, there are still so many important battles to win in the future. We only have 72 hours to hit our FINAL goal of the year – and if we fall short, we won’t have the resources we need to start 2023 off right. Failing to hit this goal would have major consequences on our ability to support our candidates and in-state partners. But, if everyone reading this email chips in $7 (worth 7X more!), we can make it across the finish line and enter 2023 feeling confident about where we stand. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | At the start of the new year, we have the opportunity to flip a seat in an ultra-competitive special election in Virginia. name: Roger Stone
subject: Season's Greetings & Happy New Year From Roger and Nydia Stone
disclaimer_text: paid for by some George Soros-funded left-wing front group
body:
| |
---
SEASON'S GREETINGS & HAPPY NEW YEAR FROM ROGER AND NYDIA STONE
---
| Dear Friend, At this special time of the birth of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ and facing a challenging new year, we both want to thank you for the loyal and steadfast support you have given us over the last two years. We can report that Roger, freed by a presidential pardon in a politically motivated witch-hunt, is working to finish his book about the entire horrific experience, as well as posting a daily web-based show at [StoneZONE.LIVE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=n7kqxkueky25ofeld8&linkid=0&link=38afd97f64a04cf683abb7cf443f7a74) everyday at 5:00 P.M. EST. We can also report that through the healing power of Jesus Christ, the aggressive stage 4 cancer that Nydia was diagnosed with almost immediately after Roger's unconditional presidential pardon, has now been in remission for 19 months. In November, President Donald Trump personally invited us to his Miami rally and publicly paid tribute to Roger for his loyalty and his refusal to be pressured into testifying falsely against the President by Robert Mueller. Here is a picture from that day: [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=n7kqxkueky25ofeld8&linkid=1&link=1949f96193dd4ae3ad2264cf8c9eaf15) Unfortunately, we still have to deal with ELEVEN totally groundless, baseless, harassment civil suits filed against us by liberals, crackpots, nutjobs, and others bitter about our survival. In one case, President Donald Trump and Roger are being sued by three Capitol Hill police officers for "endangering their lives" with their lawsuit being paid for by some George Soros-funded left-wing front group. Needless to say, any claim that Roger knew about, was involved in, or condoned any illegal activity on January 6th, is just a fake news-generated lie. Our monthly legal bills run an average of $40,000 a month. Still there is not a month in which the total of our legal expenses, the cost of living modestly, and Nydia's uninsured medical expenses do not exceed the amount of money Roger generates by writing, speaking, and selling products on his website [StoneZONE.com](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=n7kqxkueky25ofeld8&linkid=2&link=bb8590a4e68b4d79af1e1e71940da5b4). **Won 't you please consider a contribution to the Stone Family Fund today? You can contribute by going [HERE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=n7kqxkueky25ofeld8&linkid=3&link=ac71d40d455e4c649f0d5a1c04633137).** The day after the election, Roger was in a horrific automobile accident outside of Memphis in which the SUV in which he was riding was totaled and the two security guards with him suffered injuries. Roger walked away from the wreck without a scratch. We truly believe we have God's protection. Once again, we are most grateful for everything you have done to support us and hope that you can help us yet again today. God Bless You and Happy New Year, ROGER AND NYDIA STONE P.S. If you prefer not to put your credit card information online, you can make a check payable to "Roger and Nydia Stone Fund" and mail it to 1007 N. Federal Highway, #405, Fort Lauderdale, Florida 33304.
---

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Things are about to get really weird
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| First, Kevin McCarthy will have to survive a leadership challenge from his right flank — with hardly a single vote to spare for House Speaker.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1522%2E5257348%2E6saQ6J)
Things are about to get really _weird_ , Derek:
**In 5 days, the new Congress will be sworn in, and Republicans will formally take the House majority.**
It’s going to be absolute chaos.
First, Kevin McCarthy will have to survive a leadership challenge from his right flank — with hardly a single vote to spare for House Speaker.
He’ll have to cave, doing and saying even more incredibly absurd stuff to ingratiate himself with Matt Gaetz, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and the QAnon fringe whose votes he’s relying on to take the top spot.
**Then he’s going to follow through on his campaign promise to kick Adam off the Intelligence Committee as retribution for Democrats removing Marjorie Taylor Greene.**
It’s an apples-to-oranges comparison, if there ever was one. Greene removed from her committees for encouraging violence against other members, and Adam removed from his committee for impeaching a corrupt president. Sure, that makes sense.
**[So Derek, will you pitch in right now to help us be prepared to respond to the utter turmoil and unhinged attacks against Adam next week by helping us hit our final FEC deadline fundraising goal?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221229_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1522%2E5257348%2E6saQ6J)**

subject: Our race happens in 2023

body:
| | | |
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d61b91b33c&e=fdefed58de)

Peter,We’ve met before, even if only online. I’m Eric Deters and I’m running for Governor of Kentucky. Our race is in 2023 and we need to move fast to get momentum.I’m the only guy running for Governor in Kentucky as a Republican who supports ending Mitch McConnell’s political career. I’m the only one running who has gone to jail fighting for my clients to receive trials. I' don’t just talk about being tough... I’m all-out bulldog who won’t take any bullshit.That’s why the political establishment hates me. That’s why I’m coming to you right today. I’ve been an ardent Trump supporter since 2015 and I hate career politicians. I’m not one of them, but that also means I have to fight their money. These fat cat sleazebags are wining and dining with the CEO of FTX and kissing George Soros’s demonic butt, but I don’t do it. I fund my own campaign and count on people like you to get me the rest of the way.
| [CHIP IN & HELP ERIC FIGHT THE ESTABLISHMENT!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e33642888b&e=fdefed58de)
---
After these midterms, these establishment hacks are feeling even more emboldened. **It’s time you and I get together and knock the wind out of their sails. Mitch got re-elected in the Senate as Leader and we’ve got another establishment dude getting ready to be Speaker... it’s on the states to clean this crap up.** I’m the only candidate in the race talking about election integrity, and after Kari Lake’s race in Arizona, I think we need to talk **A LOT** more about it.
| [HELP ERIC CLEAN UP THE ELECTIONS!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4e4bdcea26&e=fdefed58de)
---
I only tell the truth and the truth of the matter is that the establishment doesn’t care about winning. They’d rather be a permanent minority party as long as they get their payoffs from whoever is paying them off.**I don’t accept failure and I don’t accept bribes. They don’t call me a “BULLDOG” for nothing.** Stop feeling dejected and defeated after the midterms. Work. Work hard to elect me to the Governorship of Kentucky so we can put the establishment back in their place, clean up our state and in turn clean up our nation.2023 is our year. It’s our race. We’ve got less time than any race out there in the country and we can absolutely kick our do-nothing Democrat Governor to the curb. This is Kentucky for Christ’s sake. A Democrat has no business running our state.The time is now and the person to help me is YOU. I’m going to leave my donation link right here if you feel so inclined to help my race out. I told you before, I’m not funded by the establishment. I’m not even taking any PAC money. All I’ve got is you.So click this link right here, help me out and let’s kick some butt: **https://secure.winred.com/deters-for-governor/donate-today** Today is a new day and we can win together.Let’s do it,Eric DetersCandidate for Kentucky Governor
|
